faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: Is Siddhant College of Engineering a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: Siddhant College of Engineering is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Siddhant College of Engineering has a rating of 2.94 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.18 on Campus Life, 2.17 on Placements, 3.16 on Faculty and 3.29 on Infrastructure.

faqs.question: What is the fees range for courses offerred by the Siddhant College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Siddhant College of Engineering is around INR 18000 - INR 260000.

placements.overview: Founded in 2005, Siddhant College of Engineering is a private institute. It is located in Pune, Maharashtra. The institute is accredited with AICTE. Siddhant College of Engineering provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 20 courses across specialisations such as Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics & Communication Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and UG Diploma. Siddhant College of Engineering fees ranges between INR 18,000 to 2,60,000. The student intake for these courses is 804. Siddhant College of Engineering offers these course across fields such as Engineering. Siddhant College of Engineering offers all the campus facilities to students.

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, Siddhant College of Engineering has an impressive review rating of 2.17 by 21 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Siddhant College of Engineering?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Siddhant College of Engineering provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Engineering, and have a fee structure of around INR 18,000 to 2,60,000. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech.

faqs.answer: A:    Siddhant College of Engineering provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma, M.E./M.Tech in streams such as Engineering, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, VLSI Design.
faqs.question: Which courses does Siddhant College of Engineering offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for AI & Data Science with a strong focus on practical skills.

review_content.Placements: Since I am in the second year, my batch has not yet gone through the final placement process. However, we see good efforts from the college for senior batches, especially in CS and AI & DS. The placement cell is active and forwards internship opportunities to us. We hear about companies like TCS, Infosys, and other Pune-based tech firms recruiting from campus. The college encourages us to build a strong portfolio. I am personally working on several web and app projects to prepare. The top roles offered to seniors are typically software developer, data analyst, and web developer.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Decent curriculum and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides average placements. The salary package offered is around 3 LPA - 4 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 11 LPA. The salary package offered last year was 10 LPA. Many students get placed in sectors like IT, consultancy, and core engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is decent. It offers essential facilities for academics. There is a comfortable living in the hostel. Our classrooms are normal. It can accommodate 60 students. The entire campus and hostel have Wi-Fi connections with a decent speed. Rooms are double in the hostel with 24/7 water and electricity supply.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Not so good faculty, placements are not so good, and decent infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: I am currently in the 2nd year of computer engineering. As far as I have seen placements are not that good. Only 10-20 students got placed but with a very low salary package of 4 LPA - 5 LPA. Our college also provides internships at TCS and Codernet, but they are unpaid. The average salary package offered is around 4 LPA - 5 LPA. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. Companies that have recruited are TCS, Codernet, and Byju's. Around 10-15% of students got internships through campus in the last month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not very good. Only the entrance can attract you. The building is not very good. There is no Wi-Fi for students. The lab is good. The library is not good for studying. I am in the hostel. The hostel facility is pretty good but the mess food is not that good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Siddhant College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: Placement is less but faculty is good. The highest package is 7 LPA and the lowest package is 2.5 LPA. There are not top companies but good startup companies hire from this college. Internship is in the third year by university. Developed role, Marketing role, and software role.
review_content.Infrastructure: All required facilities are provided by the college and infrastructure is good, and the surrounding is also good. Hostels provide all facilities but there is a need for a little improvement in the canteen. Food is average and feels are also high. Sports and games are conducted by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Avoid negative things; focus on positive things.

review_content.Placements: Placement is average. 20-30 percent of students are placed from my batch. The highest package is 9 Lacs and the lowest package is 2.5 Lacs. There are small companies; there are no big companies. There is compulsory internship in 3-year college provide guidance for that.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good and the surrounding is full of nature. Every department is good, but in some cases, there is no faculty for teaching. The hostel is good; all facilities are available in the hostel but it is very expensive. You can take a room on rent; it's better.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Not good for placement if you have taken this college.

review_content.Placements: I feel disappoint with the placement opportunities offered by our college. The top companies that come for recruitment are IBM, TCS, Wipro, and others. However, the college doesn't help us much when it comes to finding internships. If they provide any assistance, it's usually for paid internships where we have to pay for the opportunity. Most of the students end up getting placed Through off-campus placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at our college is generally good, but there have been some maintenance issues lately. The arrival of new principal has led to significant changes. We now have Wi-Fi available, but we have to ask the teachers for the password. The computer labs are not in best condition, as some of the PCs are not working properly. Although there is a LAN network, the connectivity is unreliable. On a positive note, the hostel is well-maintained, and the ground is spacious and in good shape and outside student are not allowed in hostel even college student.

description: Siddhant College of Engineering cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Siddhant College of Engineering JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Siddhant College of Engineering cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 258175 and 558082 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 258175, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 223172.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 258175.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the All India quota. For the General category, the Siddhant College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 89.37, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science. Refer to the table below to see the first and last-round cutoff percentiles for various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations for General category students belon

Siddhant College of Engineering MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 89.37. For the same competitive branch/course, the last round cutoff was 60.5 in the General category under the HS quota.
Some of the important dates related to MHT CET 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

According to the last round of M.E./M.Tech cutoff 2025 for the General HS category, the top three most competitive specialisations were M.E. in Computer Engineering, followed by M.Tech. in Design Engineering, and M.Tech. in VLSI and Embeded Systems, with the cutoff being 5.52, 3.67 and 1, respectively.

reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi connectivity, no classroom lectures are taken in laboratory, and laboratories are not useful all instruments get breaks and not in good condition. It provides library, but they are not given more than 3 books. Canteens are not maintaining hygiene The dogs are grooming inside the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: One can only pursue their course and nothing else.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good to study. The library is good, but it is not silent for students to study, as there are no staff to monitor the students. Wi-Fi facility is available on every floor, but it is for just a show. Sports are held by students as the teachers do not interact with us, and many students don't even know that a teacher has been appointed for sports. Labs for the first-year students are good. The canteen is good, and the food provided is tasty. Hostel rooms are maintained with good staf...

reviews.review_heading: The college campus is good, but there are only a few students. Scholarships were not offered.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't provide any Wi-Fi and sports facilities. The campus is good, but they don't provide many facilities. Classrooms are good but not comfortable. There is only one projector in the electrical and telecommunications department. Only a few kits are available in practical sessions.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2016, and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Siddhant College provides the best facilities in education and indoor-outdoor games. The campus is big, and there is a large playground for outdoor activities. We have the best staff for teaching. Laboratories are available for science, mechanical, computer and all the branches. The hostel has big rooms, and the canteen provides the best food.

admission_overview.college_name: Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology Admission 2026: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology admissionis mainly entrance-based. Also known asECET, the college offers BTech, MTech, MBA, and Diploma courses. The institute conducts an online mode of application for all the courses. ECET offers admission to courses based on entrance exam score. The college accepts entrance exams such as TS EAMCET, TSICET, etc. for admission to specific courses.

The institute offers several specialisations in BTech, MTech, and diploma courses. Admission to ECET is entrance-based. The institute accepts TS EAMCET, TSICET, TS POLYCET, GATE, and TS PGECET for admission to BTech, MBA, diploma, and MTech courses respectively. Check belowECET coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with 50% from a recognised board
Graduation degree with 50% aggregate
After Class 10 Diploma
Pass Class 10 with 40% aggregate
Graduation with 50% aggregate
GATE,TS PGECET

Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology admission process is entrance-based. Candidates who get shortlisted based on their merit are eligible for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in the college:
Step 1: Visit the ECET Website
Candidates seeking admission to various programme at the Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology must fill up the admission form online.
Step 2: ECET Selection Round

The college shortlists candidates based on entrance exam score. Aspirants must qualify TS EAMCET and TSICET for admission to BTech and MBA courses, respectively. The selection for MTech programme is based on GATE or TS PGECET scores.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation & Admission Confirmation

Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology will release a merit list of the selected candidates for the final seat allotment. Candidates selected for the course must complete their enrollment by submitting theEllenki College of Engineering and Technology feeswithin the given deadline to grab the seats.

Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 61507 and 82625 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science), B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 61507, 66368 and 66746, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for average students.
reviews.review_text: Our college had best infrastructure and facilities for every department, including Wi-Fi, classrooms, and libraries. The hostel facilities and the quality of food in the mess and canteen were very good. The college provided 24/7 facilities. The campus also had sports grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Average college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college had the best infrastructure, including a cricket ground, Wi-Fi facilities, and well-equipped labs for all departments. The classrooms were good, and the library was big and had all kinds of books. The hostel facilities were good, and the food in the mess and canteen was hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: This course has good future in future.
reviews.review_text: Our college is best in terms of infrastructure, like cricket grounds, Wi-Fi, good classrooms, and a well-stocked library with all types of books. The quality of facilities in our college is very good, and the food available in the mess and canteen is very good and neat. Our college has 24/7 medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: In this college, infrastructure quality was very good and nice. The college departments provided facilities like fast Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, classrooms, bathrooms, etc. The canteen food was very good. They provided neat and clean meals. There was a sports committee that organized sports and game facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It was a good college with good placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college excelled in infrastructure. It had a good Wi-Fi and neat classrooms. There were well-equipped labs for every department. Our college had a big library with collection of books. The quality of food in the mess and hostel was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Not a good college for studying.
reviews.review_text: College provides facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, table tennis, turf, etc. The quality of medical services provided by our college is the best. However, the food is not good and is average in quality. Cricket is my favorite sport provided at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college had very good infrastructure with all necessary facilities. Each department had its own labs. Campus hostel, located near the campus was highly secure and offered good food facilities, a mess, canteen, and ground. Medical facilities were always available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: A good college with a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college is the best in the tier 3 colleges category. The facilities and infrastructure are excellent, and there is a Wi-Fi facility. We have good classrooms, a big library with all types of books, and labs for every department. The college also provides medical facilities. The quality of food in the mess and canteen, as well as the hostel, is excellent. The college also has sports grounds for all types of games.

reviews.review_heading: The best college with no enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: Our college is the best in terms of infrastructure and facilities. The college has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs for every department, a big library with all types of books, and good classrooms. The quality of food in the hostel and mess is good, and the college also provides 24/7 medical facilities. The college has sports grounds for all games.

reviews.review_heading: I'm completely satisfied with the placements provided in our course in 2021.
reviews.review_text: In our department, the facilities are amazing. They provide many facilities, like AC classrooms, libraries, Wi-Fi routers, auditoriums, seminar halls, and project labs. The hostel is good with the facilities like a variety of food items in the kitchen and canteen. The rooms are neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: Really good placements are offered in our year from our course.
reviews.review_text: Our entire campus is widely spread along 45 acres of land with many great facilities, like separate blocks for different branches of students, AC classrooms, library, free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, placement rooms, auditorium, project labs, lawn, waiting room, indoor complex, etc. The hostel is also excellent in providing quality facilities like good food, clean rooms, and a hygienic environment. The medical team is doing an excellent job and they're available for students the entire day. ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology for diploma admission.
reviews.review_text: This college's infrastructure department and hostel facilities provided the same and very high quality of products, like classrooms, bathrooms, bedrooms, labs, libraries, etc. In this college, there were multiple sports committees. Event committee was organised every year. Game tournament and cultural committee organised dance, fashion shows, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college is the best in terms of infrastructure, with good classrooms, WiFi facilities, labs for every department and a big library with all types of books. The quality of food in the hostel and canteen is good. The facilities in our hostel and college are excellent. The college also provides 24/7 medical facilities and there are sports grounds for every game. Our college ground is very big and large.

reviews.review_heading: Ellenki College of Engineering: Affordable learning, growing opportunities, and campus Life.
reviews.review_text: Particularly in the Computer Science and Engineering department, there are multiple specialized laboratories. Each lab is well-equipped with a range of computing systems and software to cater to various aspects of computer science education and project needs.

reviews.review_heading: College is not good at faculty. Only some teachers, not all, that's it.
reviews.review_text: About the facilities and infrastructure, the infrastructure is good, and there is Wi-Fi, but it is only for faculty, not for students. Facilities are not good in hostels. The campus is not correct, especially in the girls' hostel. The boys are serving food at night, which is not good. In the laboratory and library, the books we need are not available.

data.description: Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology is committed to empowering change and fostering a brighter future for all. The institute takes immense pride in its dedicated faculty members who serve as the backbone of its academic excellence. The educators at Ellenki College of Engineering and Technology are not just teachers but mentors, researchers, and industry professionals who bring a wealth of knowledge and experience to the classroom. They actively engage themselves in various events like conferences, seminars, and industry collaborations to contribute to students and the community.

faqs.answer: A:    The BSc application fee at Mangalayatan University is INR 500. The application fee must be paid once the application form is submitted. Candidates can pay the application fee online via net a Demand Draft drawn in favor Of Mangalayatan University, Aligarh (UP) payable at Aligarh (UP) or the fees can also be paid offline by paying cash only at the University fees counter.
faqs.question: What is the BSc application fee at Mangalayatan University?

faqs.answer: A:    CUET UG 2026 exam will be conducted in May/June for 37 subjects. The mode of examination is CBT (Computer Based Test). NTA did not release official notification for CUET UG date sheet. Candidates can know exam details through CUET UG information bulletin. NTA will conduct CUET UG 2026 exam in multiple phases depending upon the number of candidates registering for the exam. Registered candidates can know the exact CUET UG exam on hall ticket. Candidates will have to report at the alloted exam centre on the day of the examination. The exam will be held in two slots each day depending upon the subject combinations chosen by the candidate.
faqs.question: When will be CUET UG exam conducted?

faqs.answer: A:    Mangalayatan University BA admission is merit and entrance based. The admission vary as per the BA specialisations. BA admisison is entirely merit-based. Candidates must secure 45% aggrgate in class 12 for BA admission.  However, for BA in Mass Comminication courses, candidates must qualify the entrance exams followed by a personal interview. The entrance exam accepted by the university is Common University Entrance Test also known as CUET UG.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is required for BA at Mangalayatan University?

faqs.answer: A:    The overall fee for BSc at Mangalayatan University ranges from INR 75,000 - INR 5 lakh. The fee vary across the BSc specialisations. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of amount INR 5,000, and a hostel fee of amount INR 2.69 Lacs that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee. Also, candidates must pay INR 500 as an application fee while submitting the application form. Candidates must have a valid eligibility criteria to get admission at BSc: Class 12 with 45% to 50% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology subjects.

review_content.Placements: About 80% of the B.Teach students were placed from my college last year. The highest package was 12 LPA, which varies from place to place. review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very well furnished with proper AC. Events and also in BBA and other courses, you'll find AC in classrooms. The quality of the hostel mess food is good; it’s fresh and till now no one has complained about it. Many students like the food.

They are trying their best for students.

review_summary.college_name: Mangalayatan University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: There is a good learning environment with decent placements and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: I completed my MBA in HR at Mangalayatan University. Our batch has a simple and practical learning style with a focus on recruitment, payroll, labor laws, and teamwork. Around 70 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered is 6 LPA, and the average package offered is 3 LPA. The lowest package offered is 2 LPA. Companies like HDFC Life, ICICI Bank, Byju's, and Genpact hire students. Roles like HR executive and recruiter are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure for an MBA in HR at Mangalayatan University is decent. It has spacious classrooms with a smart board, Wi-Fi, a library, and basic computer labs useful for projects. Hostels are clean and safe. The mess food is average, but hygienic. The canteen is available. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports facilities are provided for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: BBA program offers a well-rounded experience with strong placements and supportive faculty.

content.Placements: I'm pursuing a BBA at Mangalayatan University. Around 70 percent of students got placed, with the highest package at 6 LPA and the average at 3.2 LPA. Companies like HDFC Bank, Justdial and BYJU's recruit here. Approximately 75 percent of students secured internships at firms such as HDFC and various start-ups. Roles offered include business development executive (BDE), HR trainee and marketing executive.
content.Infrastructure: BBA department features smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, computer labs and a well-stocked library. The campus is clean and spacious, equipped with 24/7 electricity, water and Wi-Fi. Mess food is average but hygienic. There's a medical room on campus and sports facilities include cricket, basketball, and other games.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: A growing institution with modern facilities and diverse programs.

content.Placements: About 80% of the B.Teach students were placed from my college last year. The highest package was 12 LPA, which varies from place to place. Top companies are HP, Infosys, Accenture, etc. About 40-50% got internships. The top roles offered in the college are placement offers and curriculum-related.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very well furnished with proper AC. Events and also in BBA and other courses, you'll find AC in classrooms. The quality of the hostel mess food is good; it’s fresh and till now no one has complained about it. Many students like the food.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good knowledge and a hostel.

content.Placements: At Mangalayatan University, our seniors easily get 100% placements. They also get special classes for training and placements. In our batch, almost all the teachers focus on the student's training and placement easily. The highest package of the university is 10 LPA. They are providing easy internships in good and reputed companies easily. We get a comfortable stipend from that company. In the role of MBA, they provide regular classes regarding the course subject. We easily do training and get placements. They are giving easy knowledge about the company. They are trying their best for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Totally it is a very nice and good university for a student who wants to pursue their graduation.

content.Placements: Last year, more than 60% of students got placements. 70% of students get internships. There are more than 250 recruiters like HCL, Tata, Infosys, other MNCs, etc. There are many roles offered like data scientist in IT sectors and many others.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is available on campus with good strength. Labs are good. There is a central library. Hostel facilities are very nice, and good quality food is available for students. A big cricket ground and many other grounds for other games are there. We have a very big garden area.

admission_overview.college_name: Mangalayatan University Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

paragraphs: Mangalayatan Universityoffers a wide range ofonline postgraduate programmes, including Master of Business Administration (MBA), Master of Commerce (M.Com.), Master of Computer Application (MCA), Master of Arts (M.A.), and Master of Science (M.Sc.). The university offers131 coursesin various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, Law, Humanities, Biomedical Education and Research, Legal Studies, and Pharmacy.UG, PG, Diploma, andPhD coursesare available, with admission criteria based onmeritor valid scores from state/national level exams.

Mangalayatan University admission to various courses either based on merit or based on the valid score obtained in any state / national level exam accepted by the university. Listed below are the details related to Mangalayatan University admission highlights about the popular courses along with the eligibility criteria:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Passed Class 12 in PCB/ PCM a minimum of 50% total
UPTU (Uttar Pradesh), RTU (Rajasthan)
BSc or equivalent UG Degree with a minimum of 50% total
Passed Class 12 with a minimum of 50% total
Passed BE/ BTech/ UG degree(depending on the course specialisation) with a minimum of 50% total
CAT/MAT/XAT/ UPTU
Passed Class 12 in PCM/ PCSM a minimum of 50% total
The admission process at Mangalayatan University is based on entrance exams, such as JEE Main, CLAT, CAT and RTU. The students will have to go through the steps presented below:
lists: Mangalayatan University admissions begin with the application procedure. students who want to apply can download the application forms from the university’s official website. The filled up application form should either be sent through mail or hand-delivered to the individual departments at the university. Furthermore, payable online application and entrance examination fees should accompany the filled-in applications which must also have two copies of the online bank challan.

Admittance into different courses based on merit as well as entrance criteria is what happens at Mangalayatan University. students interested in PG courses must qualify in university level examinations such as CAT, MAT, XAT and other state-level entrance tests depending on particular course specialization areas while UG courses like B.Tech where admission is determined by last qualifying exam merit scores together with other examination score cards such as JEE Main.

Following the completion of all selection rounds, students are asked to participate in the counselling process for their respective courses. Mangalayatan University will release merit lists comprising the names of selected students in various rounds. Students whose names appear on the merit list must pay a specific amount of fee to secure their seat in the desired course.

faqs.question: How much preparation time is ideal for CUET-PG exam?
faqs.answer: The ideal duraton will depend on the personal capabilities of each candidate. The CUET-PG exam is a difficult exam however, with a proper preparation strategy, it can be easily cleared. Practising mock exams from the previous year's CUET-PG exams and focusing on high-weightage sections of the exam are the ideal ways to prepare for the CUET-PG exam.

faqs.question: What should I do to get a direct admission in Mangalayatan University for B.Tech?
faqs.answer: There are two modes of admission process for B.Tech in Mangalayatan University: the regular mode is after 12th through entrance examinations conducted, and the other mode is through lateral entry mode, where candidates can directly take admission into the second year, it is only for those who have completed a three-year Diploma course. However, the qualifications for the B.Tech programme stands at 55percent aggregate in 10+2 and QUALIFYING JEE marks sheet. The student must fill the form for application and update their results on opening of admissions.

faqs.question: What score is needed for admission to various courses offered at Mangalayatan University?
faqs.answer: Mangalayatan University is one of the State Universities of Uttar Pradesh. The University was founded in 2006 and is situated 20 kms from Yamuna Expressway, UP. the score required for admission to various courses at Mangalayatan University includes percentiles ranging from 60-85 for MBA, MUJEE exam scores for B.Tech, and 55% marks in Master's degree exams for Ph.D. programs.

faqs.question: Can students get selected at Mangalayatan University with CAT range of 60-70 percentile?
faqs.answer: Mangalayatan university also accepts CAT/MAT/XAT/UPSEE score for MBA and CLAT score for LLM.Students get selected at 60-70 percentile and it is completely depends on Categories.For SC/ST students there is posibility to get selected . Other categories students have atleast 85 percentile to get selected in the college. Apart from that 50% in class 12 is necessary for the admission .

faqs.question: What is the last date for filling CUET application form?
faqs.answer: National Testing Agency re-commenced CUET 2026 registration on February 23, 2026. Soon after the release of the CUET notification, candidates can check the important dates about CUET 2026. The last date for CUET 2026 registration was February 26, 2026 (11.50 PM).Candidates were required to fill the CUET application form within the given time frame, failing which no request for extension of the CUET registration last date will be entertained. NTA does not provide the window for late fee payment. CUET 2026 application process is in online mode. No physical copies of the CUET application form must be sent to the authorities.

reviews.review_heading: There is a good learning environment with decent placements and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for an MBA in HR at Mangalayatan University is decent. It has spacious classrooms with a smart board, Wi-Fi, a library, and basic computer labs useful for projects. Hostels are clean and safe. The mess food is average, but hygienic. The canteen is available. Medical facilities are available on campus. Sports facilities are provided for students.

reviews.review_heading: BBA program offers a well-rounded experience with strong placements and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: BBA department features smart classrooms, Wi-Fi, computer labs and a well-stocked library. The campus is clean and spacious, equipped with 24/7 electricity, water and Wi-Fi. Mess food is average but hygienic. There's a medical room on campus and sports facilities include cricket, basketball, and other games.

reviews.review_heading: A growing institution with modern facilities and diverse programs.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very well furnished with proper AC. Events and also in BBA and other courses, you'll find AC in classrooms. The quality of the hostel mess food is good; it’s fresh and till now no one has complained about it. Many students like the food.

reviews.review_heading: Totally it is a very nice and good university for a student who wants to pursue their graduation.

Hostel facilities are very nice, and good quality food is available for students. A big cricket ground and many other grounds for other games are there. We have a very big garden area.

reviews.review_heading: Life in Mangalayatan University: Good or Bad.

reviews.review_heading: The overall description of Mangalayatan University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good enough. The University takes proper care of its buildings and surroundings. There is a Jain temple in the center of the university and a Durga temple. Right now, the University is working more to improve its department buildings and hostels. Mess food is good and average. Gym is available for both boys and girls. reviews.review_heading: I am happy that I am not in the wrong place. The faculty here at IES is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Good life with a good university.

The classrooms are well-maintained and conducive to learning. The library is in excellent condition and houses all the necessary books required for your courses. The hostel facilities are also commendable. The mess serves high-quality food that is greatly appreciated.

reviews.review_heading: The university is very nice.

At my university, there are many facilities and smart labs for every department. 
Wi-Fi facilities are available on the entire campus. And network spread is very fast. Smart class rooms are present. One central library. Hostels are excellent; the mess serves high-quality food, and the hostel rooms are extremely luxurious.

reviews.review_heading: This university is very good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, and the spread of Wi-Fi is very fast. Many labs are present, like X-ray, MRI LAB, ULTRASOUND, DENTAL, and every department has personal labs. Conditions of classes are very good. One central library is present. Hostels are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives a great experience for students.
reviews.review_text: Our campus was the main attraction because it was spread over 65 acres with lush greenery. There were good classrooms. Hostels were good and served hygienic and tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: College is good for placement .
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is large in size because it is a main university campus and every type of facility is provided here. In that huge campus we have digital classrooms and a well facilitated computer lab with latest version of windows, our library is also fully stocked with books for every single course and it is also huge in size. Classrooms are also large in size which can fit 70 students in it and have AC. The hostel facilities are also awesome; rooms are large in size and can occupy 4...

paragraphs: The BSc application fee at Mangalayatan University is INR 500. The application fee must be paid once the application form is submitted. Candidates can pay the application fee online via net a Demand Draft drawn in favor Of Mangalayatan University, Aligarh (UP) payable at Aligarh (UP) or the fees can also be paid offline by paying cash only at the University fees counter.

The overall fee for BSc at Mangalayatan University ranges from INR 75,000 - INR 5 lakh. The fee vary across the BSc specialisations. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of amount INR 5,000, and a hostel fee of amount INR 2.69 Lacs that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee. Also, candidates must pay INR 500 as an application fee while submitting the application form. Candidates must have a valid eligibility criteria to get admission at BSc: Class 12 with 45% to 50% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology subjects.

Mangalayatan University DPharma tuition fee is around INR 1.9 lakh. The tuition fee is overall fees of two terms. The DPharma fees includes multiple components such as one-time admission fee of amount INR 5,000, and a hostel fee of amount INR 1.37 Lacs that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee. Also, application fee of INR 500 is added to the tuition fee, which candidates must pay during application submission.

The fees of BPharma in Mangalayatan University at Mangalayatan University is around INR 4.4 lakh. Apart from the tuition fee, there is a one-time admission fee of amount INR 5,000, and a hostel fee of amount INR 2.69 Lacs that students are required to pay in addition to the tuition fee. faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: Pravara Rural Engineering College cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Pravara Rural Engineering College JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Pravara Rural Engineering College cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 201109 and 336289 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 201109, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 215031.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 201109.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the Pravara Rural Engineering College B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 68.12 and 87.14, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 87.14. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 68.12, Civil became th

Pravara Rural Engineering College MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 87.14. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 84.61 in the General category under the HS quota.
Some of the important dates related to MHT CET 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.

According to the last round of M.E./M.Tech cutoff 2025 for the General HS category, the top three most competitive specialisations were M.E. in Structural Engineering, followed by M.Tech. in Computer Engineering, and M.Tech. in Design Engineering, with the cutoff being 16.37, 13.32 and 13, respectively.

hostel.description: The two boys hostel can accommodate 650 students and girls hostel can accommodate 369 seats. Both the hostels have a well-furnished dining hall. Hostels have recreation facilities like T.V., indoor games, reading rooms etc.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best, and I will recommend everyone to take admission.
reviews.review_text: The Computer Engineering department provides good infrastructure. It has high-speed Wi-Fi, well-maintained and fully equipped laboratories, spacious classrooms, and access to a central digital library with updated books and journals. The campus is clean and well-managed. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms, 24/7 water supply, Wi-Fi, and basic furniture.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best, and I would also recommend students to take admission in my college.
reviews.review_text: The Computer Engineering department provided good infrastructure. It includes high-speed Wi-Fi, well-maintained and fully equipped laboratories, spacious classrooms, and access to a central digital library with updated books and journals. The campus was clean and well managed. Hostel facilities were decent with clean rooms, 24/7 water supply, Wi-Fi, and basic furniture.

reviews.review_heading: My college life at a local college.
reviews.review_text: The hostels are clean and facilities are yet to short; there is maintained discipline and no ruckus for any of the hostels; the libraries are clean and calm; the full classrooms are wide and breathable; fans are available; the food is pretty good in the mess; if you get bored, you have a canteen nearby; and sports are taken seriously; food is clean and nice.

reviews.review_heading: College beyond expectation gave me the best experience.
reviews.review_text: College is very spacious. It has more than 5 branches and each branch have different labs, workshops and separate classrooms. Lab contains each and every equipment needed to perform practical for student. Hostel is also very spacious. Girls and boys hostels are located at different campus. Hostel is well maintained with every needed facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It provides the best teachers, and placements are good for 2022.
reviews.review_text: In this college, students have separate lockers and cupboards for each person. The hostel has facilities like RO drinking water and sports. The quality of mess food is good. Students get two types of rooms i.e two-seater and three-seater. There are a lot of facilities in the hostel, and I suggest everyone take admission to this college. All services of the hostel are excellent, and students feel that they are at home. I also like this hostel very much.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is amazing and has a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in the heart of the city. There are separate hostel facilities for boys and girls on campus. We have a transport facility, cafeteria, library, information center, canteen, and internet center.

reviews.review_heading: Average college faculty members are not up to the mark and placements are mostly in IT companies.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members of the institute are not up to the mark. Some of them are good but most others are average. The library is good. And the Wi-Fi speed is also good in the library. Classrooms are old and need renovation. Food and canteen are also average not very good and sports and other activities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review on Pravara Rural Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average. But the staff is good for teaching. Facilities were not enough because we were the pandemic batch but the infrastructure is huge. There is a good Wi-Fi connection in the library and central building also. The classroom and labs are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its faculty members, placements, and infrastructure facilities.
reviews.review_text: There was an ARC laboratory that was well-equipped and can hold a lot of students at a time. There were various laboratories as per the need according to the latest requirements. There were two hostels one for first-year students, and the second one for the remaining 3-year students, which was good. The food quality was average in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied by this college.
reviews.review_text: It is a very huge campus with an ecofriendly atmosphere. Teachers are very helpful. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, parking for bikes and cars are separate, canteen food is hygienic, playground for basketball, football, cricket are available. Hostel is also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our laboratories is useful for practical purposes. The hostel infrastructure is very good with the construction seems ancient but it is very good. The hostel has an attached mess where they serve 2 meals and even breakfast. They serve different menus every day with a feast on Sunday.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and departments are well developed.
reviews.review_text: This college has all the necessary infrastructure, and the facilities on the campus are good, but lacks the latest equipment in the laboratory. The classrooms are big and spacious. The seating is comfortable. There is no sports center, but the campus has ATM, Wi-Fi networks, and a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the necessary infrastructure and facilities but lacks the latest equipment in the laboratories. The classrooms are big and spacious and have comfortable seating too. There is no sports centre, but the campus has an ATM machine, Wi-Fi networks, and a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: The students' experience has been great in this college.
reviews.review_text: This college has all the necessary infrastructure, and facilities on the campus, but lacks the latest equipment in the laboratory. The classrooms are big and spacious. The seating is comfortable. There is no sports center, but the campus is having Wi-Fi networks. The canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is pretty good.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the necessary infrastructure and facilities but lacks the latest equipment in the laboratories. The classrooms are big and spacious. The seating is comfortable too. There is no sports centre, but the campus has an ATM machine, Wi-Fi networks, canteen etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: University College of Technology, Osmania University offers UG, PG, and PhD programmes to students. These courses are given across the Engineering, Pharmacy, and various other streams. At the UG level, there is BTech course available in the college. BTech is available in three specialisations such as Chemical Engineering, Food Technology, and Textile Technology. There are MTech and MPharma programmes available at the PG level. 4 PhD programmes are also available in the college. The total seat intake for the BTech course is 60. The below are the University College of Technology, Osmania University courses and their respective eligibility and :

faqs.answer: A:    University College of Engineering Osmania University BTech fees are higher for some specialised branches. AI & ML has tuition around INR 1.20 Lacs per year. Mining Engineering is approximately INR 1.0 Lacs per year.
faqs.question: Is the University College of Engineering Osmania University BTech fee the same for specialised branches?

faqs.answer:
A:    University College of Technology, Osmania University has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates must have completed 17 years of age as on 31st December of the year of admission and an upper age limit of 22 years for all the candidates and 25 years in respect of Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe candidates as on 31st December of the year of Admissions.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Chemical Engg. from any recognised University/Institute.M.PharmaCandidate must have completed B.Pharma from any recognised University/Institute.
faqs.question: How can I get into University College of Technology, Osmania University for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    In addition to tuition, University College of Engineering Osmania University BTech students pay a one-time special fee. This is approximately INR 9,770. It is applicable to all B.E./BTech students.
faqs.question: Are there any one-time charges in University College of Engineering Osmania University BTech fees?

faqs.answer: A:    The University College of Engineering Osmania University BTech fee is around INR 50,000 per year for most core branches. This includes streams like Civil, Mechanical, EEE, ECE, and CSE. Fees are affordable compared to many institutions.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Textile Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review for textile technology at Osmania College of Technology.

review_content.Placements: I am from Textile Technology and my batch consists of 23 people out of which 5 are placed at Welspun industries. Aditya birla fashion and Retail is in pipeline now and some student interviews are done. Coming to internships all 23 did internships at different reputed companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The course is pretty good and the faculty is amazing tier skills teaching are appreciable. The head of the department is always supportive of students and works for our welfare of us. The hostel is not at all good, we have water and electricity issues. I don't recommend a hostel at all.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The best college for chemical engineering.

review_content.Placements: Every year 75% of the students get placed in campus placements and the highest package is 9 LPA, the average package is 5 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA, top recruit companies are WIPRO, TCS, Cognizant, Pinnacle ltd, Welspun and many other pharmaceutical companies. Every student in our college does an internship in the summer after the end of 3-II SEM in companies like ONGC, NFC, IICT, and Dr Reddy's and the top roles offered are Executive and Technician.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are smart with basic amenities and we have Wi-Fi all over the campus and many core labs like FLUID MECHANICS, HEAT TRANSFER, MASS TRANSFER, MECHANICAL UNIT OPERATIONS, Physics Chemistry and a vast library with a lot of core and non-core jobs, The quality of hostel is good and the food is also okay and we have a private canteen and a health centre for our university free for all the students and a lot of sports and games as cricket, badminton, table tennis, basketball, volleyball, chess and carrom.

faqs.answer: The TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in three phases, namely Phase 1, Phase 2, and the Final Phase, for admission into BE/BTech/BPharma courses by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) and will be managed by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). faqs.question: Q: TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in how many rounds?

faqs.answer: TS EAMCET Counselling process is ongoing. TS EAMCET Seat Allotment results for Phase 1 Counselling are out. To download the allotment order, candidates must login at the official webiste of TS EAMCET at tseamcet.nic.in. To be conducted in three phases TS EAMCET 2025 Phase 2 Counselling process began in July, whereas the Final Phase counselling process will begin August. Based on the candidate's achieved ranks, TS EAMCET seats are allocated.

review_summary.college_name: Osmania University College of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college has resources, but it's the students' responsibility to use them properly.

content.Placements: 30-80% of students are placed depending on job availability and the number of students meeting the eligibility criteria. The highest package is 7.5 LPA and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Pinnacle, NFC, IICT, and L&T. More than 90% of students are provided internships, which are important for the curriculum and have credit. Top roles could be head of operations in a factory or process design engineer in a company, and the pay scale usually increases with experience.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is huge but a little old. Classrooms are big enough to accommodate students properly. Facilities like Wi-Fi and the library are good. The library has all the books related to the course and curriculum, and even more information than required. One can work on advanced projects if the library is utilized properly. The hostel infrastructure is not great. The rooms are neat, but the number of people in a room is more than needed; a room for 5 is shared by 6 people. Sports and games facilities are not bad; there are a lot of big grounds to play on, but finding teams and people to play with might be a challenge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Textile Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Amazing college with good experience .

content.Placements: 60 percent of students were placed in our course. The highest package was 7 lacs, and the lowest package was 4 lacs. Jockey and some others are the top recruiters. The college has different courses, like chemical engineering, food technology and textile technology.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities services in our course is good and we also have all the things we needs in college and Wi-Fi in hostel. Also, we have grounds for sports, a gym, etc. Food is good in hostel and also in canteen. We have health care centre and hospital at university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Textile Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review for textile technology at Osmania College of Technology.

content.Placements: I am from Textile Technology and my batch consists of 23 people out of which 5 are placed at Welspun industries. Aditya birla fashion and Retail is in pipeline now and some student interviews are done. Coming to internships all 23 did internships at different reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: The course is pretty good and the faculty is amazing tier skills teaching are appreciable. The head of the department is always supportive of students and works for our welfare of us. The hostel is not at all good, we have water and electricity issues. I don't recommend a hostel at all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The best college for chemical engineering.

content.Placements: Every year 75% of the students get placed in campus placements and the highest package is 9 LPA, the average package is 5 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA, top recruit companies are WIPRO, TCS, Cognizant, Pinnacle ltd, Welspun and many other pharmaceutical companies. Every student in our college does an internship in the summer after the end of 3-II SEM in companies like ONGC, NFC, IICT, and Dr Reddy's and the top roles offered are Executive and Technician.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are smart with basic amenities and we have Wi-Fi all over the campus and many core labs like FLUID MECHANICS, HEAT TRANSFER, MASS TRANSFER, MECHANICAL UNIT OPERATIONS, Physics Chemistry and a vast library with a lot of core and non-core jobs, The quality of hostel is good and the food is also okay and we have a private canteen and a health centre for our university free for all the students and a lot of sports and games as cricket, badminton, table tennis, basketball, volleyball, chess and carrom.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for chemical engineering.

content.Placements: More than 85% of students get placed every year. The highest salary package offered is 7 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 5 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Wipro, Pinnacle Ltd., L&T, and ITC. Everyone from the course does an internship at companies like ONGC, IICT, NFC, Dr. Reddy's Laboratories, HPCL, etc. New companies are also added every year. The top roles offered in our course are executive, technician, and plant manager.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is Wi-Fi-enabled. All the classrooms are digital. We have a physics lab, a chemistry lab, a fluid mechanics lab, a heat transfer lab, a mass transfer lab, a process instrumentation lab, and a process simulation lab. We have a vast library with books and journals related to the course and various other books. The hostel is good in terms of infrastructure. The food in the mess is good. The canteen is also better in terms of food. The university has a PHC, and every student is treated for free. We play lots of games and sports like cricket, table tennis, chess, carrom, volleyball, basketball, kabaddi, badminton, etc.

faqs.question: TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in how many rounds?
faqs.answer: The TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in three phases, namely Phase 1, Phase 2, and the Final Phase, for admission into BE/BTech/BPharma courses by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) and will be managed by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). Further, TS EAMCET (now TS EAPCET) Spot Round will also be conducted for Private Unaided Engineering Colleges.

faqs.question: What is TS EAMCET 2025 Counselling schedule?
faqs.answer: TS EAMCET Counselling process is ongoing. TS EAMCET Seat Allotment results for Phase 1 Counselling are out. To download the allotment order, candidates must login at the official webiste of TS EAMCET at tseamcet.nic.in.To be conducted in three phases TS EAMCET 2025 Phase 2 Counselling process began inJuly, whereas the Final Phase counselling process will beginAugust. Based on the candidate's achieved ranks, TS EAMCET seats are allocated.

faqs.question: How can I get into University College of Technology, Osmania University for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
University College of Technology, Osmania University has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates must have completed 17 years of age as on 31st December of the year of admission and an upper age limit of 22 years for all the candidates and 25 years in respect of Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe candidates as on 31st December of the year of Admissions.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in Chemical Engg. from any recognised University/Institute.M.PharmaCandidate must have completed B.Pharma from any recognised University/Institute.

college_info.intro: The flagship courses offered at MAM College of Engineering are BE, BTech, MTech, MBA and MCA across various specialisations. Candidates can check the MAM College of Engineering popular programmes details in this space:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MAM College of Engineering offers UG and PG courses across Engineering streams. The BTech course duration is four years. In addition to this, MTech, MBA and MCA courses are of two years. Check the MAM College of Engineering course details along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has enough facilities and well experienced staffs.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students got internships. Companies such as Retech, Gb Tech, Gb Tech Corp., etc. The lowest is INR 12,000, and the highest is INR 45,000 per semester. There are various departments in our college. Many companies offer our placement package of 4 to 5 LPAs. 100% of students were placed in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and high-quality labs are the facilities at our college. Well-maintained environment. There are many auditoriums for events, inaugurations, seminars, etc. Hosta foods are unlimited in our college. They provided three days of non-vegetables like chicken, fish, eggs, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Our institute has well-qualified and knowledgeable faculty.

review_content.Placements: In my college, 55% of students get placements in our course. In this course, the college placements cell was giving good placement opportunities to the students. The average package offered in our course was 3-6 LPA. The top recruiters in our course were Goldman Sachs, Deloitte, Accenture, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was well maintained and fully developed. Our college campus had high-speed Wi-Fi connectivity. Labs and the library had all the necessary study stuff. The classrooms of the college were big and had projectors, a digital board, proper seating, etc.

review_summary.college_name: MAM College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements, good infrastructure, facilities, etc.

content.Placements: Placements are low. If you want to get placed, you need to work hard. Placements depend on your hard work. Most of the companies which recruit are local companies. Some of the top companies come. You can complete the course and try for placements in and out of the college.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi facility in the college for students. You can use your mobile data. Mobile phones are allowed. Books for every department and subject are available in the library. The hostel mess food is okay. There are 3-4 canteens in the college. They provide the best food.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: MAM College of Engineering absolutely good college

content.Placements: MAM college of engineering is most reputed college. Around 90-95 percentage of students are placed every year. The college placement training team conduct many campus interviews every year. India's most reputed companies like TCS, Infosys, Zoho, TVS, Yamaha, Honda, OLA visit this college campus for interviews. Student's salary package is 3-10 Lakhs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: MAM College of Engineering has spacious classrooms with projector and air conditioning facilities are also available. This college has more computer laboratories with free internet. Well equipped library is also there in this college. This this college has separate hostels for boys and girls. Mess and canteen facilities are also available. Food quality is good. Basketball ground facilities also here in his college.

admission_process.title: MAM College of Engineering Admission Process 2024

paragraphs: MAM College of Engineering admission is merit based for programmes offered at UG and PG levels. In total, the institution offers 21 courses to the students across various streams, such as Engineering, IT & Software, and Business & Management Studies, among others. Amid all these courses, some of the popularMAM College of Engineering coursesoffered at the UG level include B.E. / B.Tech and at the PG level, the institution provides, MCA, MBA/PGDM, and M.E./M.Tech, etc. Students interested in MAM College of Engineering admission 2024 must check the fees and other details below:
lists: MAM College of Engineering Fees: The overall tuition fees charged for UG courses range between INR 170,000 - INR 200,000 and the total tuition fees for PG courses range between INR 35,000 - INR 50,000. In addition to the tuition fees, students might also be required to pay application, exam and other fee components. Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.
MAM College of Engineering Course Duration: The duration for UG courses provided by MAM College of Engineering ranges between 3 - 4 years and the same for PG courses is 2 years.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on campus. A library is available with thousands of books. The quality of the hostel is very neat. The quantity of food in the mess is unlimited. Medical facilities are available in our college.

The same importance in academics is also given to other activities where students are fully motivated to attend various symposiums to prove their ability.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied somewhat with the college and the administration, but not with teachers.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we are provided with many amenities such as college Wi-Fi, which is very slow sometimes, but classrooms are medium, and the library has 3,000 books. The hostel is not up to the mark as they don't provide good food and also not provide according to schedule. There is no medical facility, and students have to go to the hospital on themselves. Sports and games facilities are provided only for athletes with many certificates at the school level.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of college is good. It has one of the best infrastructures among other Trichy colleges. RO water facilities are available both in college and hostel. The only fault is they will say that the campus is Wi-Fi enabled, but they don't provide proper internet connectivity.

reviews.review_heading: The college is not up to the mark, but has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is unique and has a pleasant nature to enjoy. It has around 4 canteens to cover every college inside the campus. Stationaries, juice shops and recreation activities are also available. Laboratories and workshops are well-equipped.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of worst college management, worst placement,worst director in 2017.

reviews.review_heading: Not a bad college but not too good either. Needs improvement a lot.

The college does not give much importance to sports and games.
Stationery is available inside the college campus.
All necessary products are available there.

Hostel facilities are below average, rooms are congested, and maintenance needs improvement. The mess food quality is average and repetitive. faqs.answer: A:    Median salary of B.E. / B.Tech course is INR 450,000 as per the reports/data available.
faqs.question: How much is the median salary of B.E. / B.Tech course by University Institute of Technology, Himachal Pradesh University?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, University Institute of Technology, Himachal Pradesh University offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like M.E./M.Tech. The University Institute of Technology, Himachal Pradesh University course fee is INR 3,60,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the placements and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: In my course, around 20 percent of students are placed. The highest package offered was around 12 LPA, and the least was around 2.4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Samsung, Intel, Havells, etc. Around 30 percent of students get internships. The top roles offered were system analyst and telecom engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not very good. The campus is very small. The labs are not maintained properly. Well-equipped equipment is not present. The library is present and is quite good, and books can be issued easily. The hostel facilities are not available in this college. PGs are available nearby, but students have to pay a lot of fees, and the quality of food there is okay, and the mess is quite nice, and there are very few sports facilities in the college, and the college has its own ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Poor infrastructure and placement.

review_content.Placements: The placement record of the college is poor. Out of 66 students, only 7-8 students get placed. The average package offered is 2.4 LPA with the highest package being 8 LPA, offered by companies like Infosys, Wipro and TCS. Hardly any students get internships. The top roles offered are in web development.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is below average. Labs are not maintained properly, and essential instruments for learning are unavailable. The library is decent for issuing books, and classrooms are nice. However, there are no hostels for students. On the brighter side, the sports facilities are good, with a big ground, and there are various clubs that students can join based on their preferences.
