overview_faqs.question: Is University Institute of Technology, Himachal Pradesh University worth considering?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at University Institute of Technology, Himachal Pradesh University are B.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, University Institute of Technology, Himachal Pradesh University has a rating of 3.5 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3.8, 3.3, 3.6 and 3.3 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: University Institute of Technology, Himachal Pradesh University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The best part is that it is located between the city and the forest.

content.Placements: In our course, there is a batch of 70 students. The highest package is 25 LPA, and the lowest is 5 LPA. Even big companies like Amazon invite students for internships. With a CGPA of 8.9, they get good internship opportunities and gain valuable knowledge from these experiences.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good. Wi-Fi facilities are excellent, and the labs are well-maintained. The library is full of books. The food in the hostel is very good. The view is amazing, and the best part is the greenery everywhere. Shops are located near the hostel, and there are also 3-4 police booths near the hostel and college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 70 percent got placed according to their skills. The highest package being offered is 8 LPA and the average package is 2.5 LPA. Companies like Infosys, Wipro, TCS, etc. Top roles offered will depend on the skills you have by learning languages, coding, and doing internships, e.g., You can be a JE or a Software Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are in good condition, and the Wi-Fi is good. The building has four floors, including labs, classrooms, library, etc. The campus library is small, but the main university library is good. Medical facilities are also provided. Food in the canteen is also not bad.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: In my course, around 20 percent of students are placed. The highest package offered was around 12 LPA, and the least was around 2.4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Samsung, Intel, Havells, etc. Around 30 percent of students get internships. The top roles offered were system analyst and telecom engineer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not very good. The campus is very small. The labs are not maintained properly. Well-equipped equipment is not present. The library is present and is quite good, and books can be issued easily. The hostel facilities are not available in this college. PGs are available nearby, but students have to pay a lot of fees, and the quality of food there is okay, and the mess is quite nice, and there are very few sports facilities in the college, and the college has its own ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Poor infrastructure and placement.

content.Placements: The placement record of the college is poor. Out of 66 students, only 7-8 students get placed. The average package offered is 2.4 LPA with the highest package being 8 LPA, offered by companies like Infosys, Wipro and TCS. Hardly any students get internships. The top roles offered are in web development.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is below average. Labs are not maintained properly, and essential instruments for learning are unavailable. The library is decent for issuing books, and classrooms are nice. However, there are no hostels for students. On the brighter side, the sports facilities are good, with a big ground, and there are various clubs that students can join based on their preferences.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good for IT and CSE branch, bad for CE and ECE.

content.Placements: Placement in UIT is limited. They have good placement in IT and CSE, but they have a low rate of placement in my trade, i.e., civil department CE, which was introduced about 4 years ago in UIT, so they have low placement in UIT. Top packages are grabbed by CSE students.
content.Infrastructure: In workshops, there is limited equipment and cannot fulfil the requirements of civil workshop equipment. There are no proper skilled teachers for teaching here. There are no hostel facilities, and there is no campus of the University Institute of Technology.

reviews.review_heading: UIT, worth to take admission!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quiet good. Students can easily access the library of the college and Wi-Fi, while the classrooms use high-tech teaching equipment for better understanding. While there's no hostel available for students, students have to depend on PG's or rented rooms around the college.

reviews.review_heading: University institute of technology, Himachal pradesh university.
reviews.review_text: There are number of facilities available for students like a separatw building for department with its own canteen, several labs are available, Wi-Fi is available for students, library is also available. Building is in a dense forest area, full of pace, no disturbance, but there's no hostel available since it just provides hostel for master degree only.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good campus and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. They provide us with all facilities like a library, classrooms, and a Wi-Fi connection. Our college provides a hostel for only B. Tech students. Sports facilities and games are provided in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place to have fun.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided in the building with a very fast LAN cable. Computer labs are available. Attendance is not given much importance. Our college building is small compared to other IIITs or NITs. Labs are fully occupied with all the necessary equipment.

reviews.review_heading: A good college to be at Shimla.
reviews.review_text: The college is having the required infrastructure, but as new trades are added there is a need of more infrastructure. The college does have any kind of hostels the students have to rent their rooms or PGs. But the PGs in the area are expensive as compared to the services.

reviews.review_heading: Decent engineering college .
reviews.review_text: 3 floor building and hostel is under construction. Wi-Fi and library facilities are available, books related to every course is in library. Washroom is available on every floor. 2 computer labs and some electrical labs are present. Hostel facility will be provided soon and other building of the college is under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Our university is fine and is a government university.
reviews.review_text: There is one computer lab and the campus Wi-Fi doesn't work well. University is built in a peaceful location but has a very small campus. There are no hostel facilities. Sports and games are available during the annual sports meet.

reviews.review_heading: HPU UIT Shimla is a good college. Placements and faculty members are pretty good.
reviews.review_text: The Infrastructure of HPU Shimla is good but the main and most important thing is that the hostel facility is not available here for any students (male/female students ). You have to stay in a PG or room for 4 years for your course. The infrastructure of uit Shimla is good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Review of University Institute of Technology, Himachal Pradesh University.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is not provided in this college. Wi-Fi is the best and the network is fast. Canteen food is hygienic and good. It provides laboratories, but due to the opening of numerous other branches, the campus is very small. Students do not get that much stage to showcase, participate or get any interactive session with seniors or juniors. Students have to make their efforts to meet people. The best is the canteen that students get in UIT.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is not good, placements are fine in this college but not worth.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is somewhat average. Our campus consists of a single building having 3-4 floors. Classrooms are not that good, but consist of smart boards and are spacious. Labs are also not well-equipped. Equipments are not that in proper working condition.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good academics, and peaceful atmosphere.

content.Placements: 78.58 percent students got placed and others went to higher studies, and others went to government UPSC job preparation. One got into IAM. The highest package is around 14 LPA and the lowest is about 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tata Elxsi, TCS, Qburst, UST Global, etc. 70 percent of students got internships in various companies like CDAC, Infosys, etc. The students get all major positions.
content.Infrastructure: Actually, the infrastructure is comparatively less, that's the only downgrade. But the college offers all the necessary infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, everything. Actually, the college lacks a men's hostel; no men's hostel is there due to land shortage, but it has a ladies' hostel. Sports and games coaches are there, but it lacks a ground. Mess and canteens are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is not that bad, not that great.

content.Placements: Around 70 percent of the ECE department received placement offers in 2025. Most of the companies are from the IT sector, like ThoughtSpot, Maya Labs, Quantiphi, Infosys, Cognizant, UST, etc. Some core companies are also present, like Schneider Electric, Zia Semiconductors, Mahindra Solarize, etc. Some went for higher studies and academic roles at institutions like IISC.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and labs are pretty good, but some components used in labs are very old. Free Wi-Fi is available on campus and in the hostel. Only a ladies' hostel is provided by the college, and no hostel facility for boys. I would say the college library is average or below average because it's a tiny library, but a decent amount of books are available. Lastly, the most disappointing part is the lack of a ground in the college.

Labs have old computers that are difficult to work with, as they are really slow. It is a very small college, so there is not much space for anything. No playground, too.

individual_reviews.title: College facilities and management.

Government Engineering College, Barton Hill KEAM Cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech programme for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota.

According to the last round closing ranks, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering faced the highest competition for admission, followed by B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and B.Tech. in Information Technology, with the cutoff being , , , respectively. This is for the General cate

As per the last round of the Government Engineering College, Barton Hill B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the top three easiest specialisations for the General HS category were, B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, followed by, B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering and , B.Tech. in Information Technology, with the closing ranks being 13038, 11096, and 7689, respectively.
Students who want admission to the Government Engineering College, Barton Hill in the upcoming academic year can refer to the table below to know the important dates regarding KEAM 2026.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Programming Laboratory, Network Laboratory, Project Laboratory, Electrical Machines Lab, Electrical Measurements and Instrumentation Lab, Power System Simulation Lab, Power Electronics Lab, Digital Circuits Lab, Microprocessor Lab, High Voltage Lab, Strength of Materials Lab, Survey Lab, Concrete Lab, Transportation Lab, Environmental Lab, Geo-technical Lab

reviews.review_heading: Good academics, and peaceful atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Actually, the infrastructure is comparatively less, that's the only downgrade. But the college offers all the necessary infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, libraries, everything. Actually, the college lacks a men's hostel; no men's hostel is there due to land shortage, but it has a ladies' hostel. Sports and games coaches are there, but it lacks a ground. Mess and canteens are good.

reviews.review_heading: College is not that bad, not that great.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are pretty good, but some components used in labs are very old. Free Wi-Fi is available on campus and in the hostel. Only a ladies' hostel is provided by the college, and no hostel facility for boys. I would say the college library is average or below average because it's a tiny library, but a decent amount of books are available. Lastly, the most disappointing part is the lack of a ground in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, poor infrastructure, no events, fests, and extra activities. Average placement.
reviews.review_text: Very poor infrastructure. The college is smaller than a school. They only have a ladies' hostel. No means hostel, and there won't be one as there is no more area to expand. Labs have old computers that are difficult to work with, as they are really slow. It is a very small college, so there is not much space for anything. No playground, too.

reviews.review_heading: True Beauty of GEC Barton Hill.
reviews.review_text: We have labs for various purposes and digital classrooms with projectors in each and every class. The college provides free Wi-Fi to students and also allocates space for various class activities. There are many technical and non-technical clubs and societies in the college.

reviews.review_heading: College facilities and management.
reviews.review_text: The whole college does not have a ground for students. Construction work in undergoing, leading to a lot of dust around the area. There is no boys' hostel. Classrooms are spacious and have good facilities. Better canteen facility can be provided.

reviews.review_heading: A good government college that is well accessible and in the heart of the city.
reviews.review_text: I was a day scholar. So I don't know about hostels. But there's college Wi-Fi, a technical library, a canteen, and also a store to get general-purpose items and snacks/tea/coffee/drinks. Labs are okay. Classrooms are good, with few classrooms having TVs. A seminar hall is also there.

reviews.review_heading: A small college but a good one
reviews.review_text: Every batch of students has their own classroom with a television and projector; the classrooms are good. Campus Wi-Fi is provided to every student after they have given the request for accessing Wi-Fi. Lab subjects will be done in the specific labs, and there are around 75 systems in each lab that can accommodate the entire class. 75 is the intake of students in each batch of the department every year. There is a department library in the building near the network security lab and a college lib...

reviews.review_heading: One of the top five engineering college in Kerala.
reviews.review_text:
The college is just 7 acres which is very small area as compared to other government college. But The college is situated on centre of the Kerala capital city 'TRIVANDRUM'. There is Wi-Fi connection throughout the college and hostel. There is various department labs and classroom and a good library
2 Ladies hostel are situated on college campus but there is not hostel for means.

reviews.review_heading: A quiet campus tucked away in the heart of Trivandrum city.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are spacious and large. They are equipped with smart boards and projectors. The desks and benches are mostly in good condition. A new block is being constructed. When completed, the college can boast of an incredible campus even in its very limited space. Men's hostel is non-existent in this college and the boys have to take up accommodation in nearby PGs or hostels. The college severely lags on the front. There is no dedicated ground for any sports. The auditorium doubles up as a...

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for good friends and academics, this will be a good choice.
reviews.review_text:
No boys' hostel is there.
There are two girls' hostels available, with more than enough seats for the girls.
No playground is available.
But lab and classroom infrastructure are inadequate.
Lab staff are good at helping.
The lab exam is not so tough. Almost all machines are in working condition.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Engineering College, Barton Hill.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available. Bus services are also available. Classrooms are maintained properly. It also provides a decent library. Many laboratories are available. Playground is not available. Boys' hostels are also not available. Our college promotes sports and games. Medical facilities are provided. Canteen is available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Small college in terms of area, big in terms of vibe.
reviews.review_text: College is small in terms of area. It is spread in an area of 5.5 acres. It has all the basic facilities a college should have. Library with all the books required during the course is available in the library. Free Wi-Fi is available in the campus. Classrooms are all projector equipped. There is no hostel for boys, hostel is only available for girls. Quality of food in canteen is average, not bad. One badminton court and one volleyball court is available. Sports meet is held every year. Apart f...

reviews.review_heading: It is a college with a small campus, but it has great faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: In academic institutions, libraries play an important role in the dissemination of knowledge. The ambience of the library reflects the quality of the education imparted by Government Engineering College, Barti (GECBH). The campus has recognised the importance of the academic vibrations required in the library and has been growing in this direction right from its very inception. The current location of the central library is well planned.

reviews.review_heading: A great college with great vibe.
reviews.review_text: Hostel available only for ladies so if you're a boy you'll have to either opt for Paying guest or a group of people like you and your friends can choose for a house available on rent, which is much more affordable since rent isn't too much, now the hard part is cooking and cleaning that you'll have to manage.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is quite good. Students are getting good placements.
reviews.review_text: Almost all classrooms are digitalised. There is a library for students that is open from 8 a.m. to 10 p.m. There are currently only hostel facilities for women. There are two ladies' hostels. Both are good. There are several facilities for laundry, cleaning, etc. Lab facilities available are also supervised by experienced professionals.

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, UST Global, etc., visit our campus for placements.
Majority of the students got internships via respective exams conducted at the college and there is an efficient placement cell present which gives proper guidance on career moulding.

Our college has a good Wi-Fi connection, labs and workshops for every department, well maintained library, etc.

The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Velammal College of Engineering and Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.answer: A:    Velammal College of Engineering and Technology has been rated 4.1 on placements.
faqs.question: Does Velammal College of Engineering and Technology provide good placement facilities?

faqs.answer: A:    As per information available, Institute offers (aprx) INR 300,000-338,000 median salary to their students for M.E./M.Tech course during placements.
faqs.question: What is the median package of M.E./M.Tech course available at Velammal College of Engineering and Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Velammal College of Engineering and Technology offers median package range of (aprx)INR 354,291 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance program as well. Additionally, it has been rated 4.1 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.
faqs.question: How much placements salary students get after studying in Velammal College of Engineering and Technology?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Velammal College of Engineering and Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Velammal College of Engineering and Technology offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Velammal College of Engineering and Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 50,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Velammal College of Engineering and Technology offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 6 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Velammal College of Engineering and Technology has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Communications Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Power Engineering.
faqs.question: Which major specializations are available at Velammal College of Engineering and Technology?

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: MBA from the Velammal College of engineering and technology.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 45–50% of the MBA students get placements at this institute. Our college placement cell organizes various on-campus placement drives. 12 LPA was the highest, 3 LPA was the lowest and 4-6 LPA was the average package offered in our course. Various management and consulting services firms visit our college for the placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: This institute has a decent infrastructure for the MBA course. The facilities of our college were good enough. All the necessary facilities, such as labs, libraries, canteens, Wi-Fi, etc., were given to the students. The hostel was available their for the students. The nearest bus stand was within walkable distance.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Velammal College of Engineering and Technology Canpus Review.

review_content.Placements: Students with 80% of marks in 12th board or management with a donation of ?4 lakh. The highest package offered was 20 LPA, the lowest package offered was 3 LPA, and the average package offered was 5-9 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Zoho, TCS, HCL, and Accenture recruit students. Internships will not be provided by the college. Core roles are very rare; mostly students are placed in the IT sector.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are quite perfect for the requirements of the course. The whole college is designed as a single block which contains all departments. Canteen food is average. Hostel food is actually good. Hostel facilities are nice and good. Sports and games are available, but support won't be provided by the management.

faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Velammal College of Engineering and Technology is up to 663. Good thing to know is that Velammal College of Engineering and Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.
faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available at Velammal College of Engineering and Technology for all courses combined?

faqs.answer: Velammal College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

admission_process.title: Velammal College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Velammal College of Engineering and Technology admissions are entrance-based. The institute accepts scores in GATE, CEETA, and TNEA, etc.Velammal College of Engineering and Technologyoffers courses at UG level in Engineering and Business and Management Studies stream. The institute offers B.E. / B.Tech for 4 years in various specialisations. Candidates can fill out the application form online for admission.

The total tuition fees for UG course isINR 2,00,000. Aspirants have to pay the programme fees at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the institute. The total fees may also include other components such as caution deposit, hostel fees, etc.

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Velammal College of Engineering and Technology for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Velammal College of Engineering and Technology is up to 663. Good thing to know is that Velammal College of Engineering and Technology has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

faqs.question: How can I get into Velammal College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Velammal College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also

data: Velammal College of Engineering and Technology BTech

reviews.review_heading: Good platform for students who want to pursue a degree, and the teaching is good.
reviews.review_text: In our ECE department, there are many facilities like microprocessor and microcontroller lab, VLSI lab, network lab, digital signal processing lab, digital electronics lab and optical lab. Quality of food is medium, and the sports and games support is not enough.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Velammal College of Engineering and Technology in 2025-26 course admission.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure quality is very good. Many facilities such as lab, bathroom, classrooms, drinking water machines, garden, canteen, hostel, etc., are available. In this college, canteen facilities are very good and tasty food is provided.

reviews.review_heading: MBA from the Velammal College of engineering and technology.
reviews.review_text: This institute has a decent infrastructure for the MBA course. The facilities of our college were good enough. All the necessary facilities, such as labs, libraries, canteens, Wi-Fi, etc., were given to the students. The hostel was available their for the students. The nearest bus stand was within walkable distance.

reviews.review_heading: Velammal College of Engineering and Technology Canpus Review.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are quite perfect for the requirements of the course. The whole college is designed as a single block which contains all departments. Canteen food is average. Hostel food is actually good. Hostel facilities are nice and good. Sports and games are available, but support won't be provided by the management.

reviews.review_heading: The college has the highest placement records.
reviews.review_text: Our college is a famous engineering college in Madurai. It provides all the facilities within the campus itself. The laboratories are highly equipped and well maintained having air conditioners. All the medical facilities are available within our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Best College In Madurai for Good teaching and Placement .
reviews.review_text: Total of 6 Different courses are offered. Each course has separate department and laboratory facilities. Excellent Canteen with good food and service. Affordable hostel facilities. Playground for different sports and a spacious parking lot. Bus transport is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Velammal College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides facilities like well-sophisticated rooms, heaters, generators, fans, lights, and separate cots. Restrooms are clean. The hostel rooms are clean every day. The food is very good and hygienic. Laboratories are good.

reviews.review_heading: Velammal College of technology and engineering is good in terms of placement.
reviews.review_text: The  college infrastructure is awesome. Free Wi-Fi is available. There are a number of classrooms, computer laboratories and departments.  Hostel facilities are available and a variety of foods are available. Sports ground is available in the college

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are vast and well-ventilated. There are six fans and six lights in each class. We have 3 computer laboratories for UG, and one computer laboratory for PG. We also have a server room which has an internet and other server controls for all laboratories. It also provides a library, which has all books and journals that students need. There is no Wi-Fi connectivity in our college. The facilities provided in the hostels are good. The rooms are highly ventilated and clean. The food served i...

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of the infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are decent, but the library is not good. There is no Wi-Fi facility available on the campus. The entire campus is very small. The food quality is below average in both the canteen and the hostel mess. The infrastructure of the hostel is also below average.

reviews.review_heading: A great college with good infra and fantastic placement records.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Labs are available. Classrooms were very neat and big. Wi-Fi is available in departments and labs as well. Classrooms are with projectors and speakers. Labs are very good with advanced standards. Library is very big which contains many sections.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and mess need improvement. Labs have all equipment all classes have computers with projectors. For medical emergencies, they take us to the nearby velammal medical college where we would be treated and the college also has a first aid kit with basic items.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good placements for the 2022 batch.
reviews.review_text: This college provides good laboratory facilities and smart classes in every classroom. It also has one big library in Madurai. It provides a neat canteen and average pricing for food. Our college has a very good medical facility. It also gives equal importance to sports.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placement and a campus.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel is somewhat good. The hostel campus is small and there is often a power cut and water shortage. The campus is clean and the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements. If you only want to get a placement, then join this college.
reviews.review_text: Mandatory facilities and infrastructure are available in our course. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available here. Hostel facilities are good. The canteen provides good quality food and snacks. The college focuses on sports. It provides basic medical facilities.

placements.overview: A total of 2 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 2 year PG degree at Vel Tech Multi Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College and 2 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 2 students 2 were placed with median salary of INR 550000 A total of 600 students were admitted in year 2017-18 for 4 year UG degree at Vel Tech Multi Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College and 607 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 607 students 502 were placed with median salary of INR 450000 and 26 students opted for higher studies.For the batch ending 2020-21, the placement record for 2 year PG course at Vel Tech Multi Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College was 1%.The median package offered for the students during this session was INR 550000 Lakh. Vel Tech Multi Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College has a placement record of 1.2% for 4 year UG course.The median package offered for the batch ending 2020-21 at Vel Tech Multi Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College was INR 450000 Lakh.

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered every semester
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vel Tech Multi Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Vel Tech Multi Tech courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Vel Tech Multi Tech courses stands around INR 35,000 to 2,20,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: You prefer the college for the placements.

review_content.Placements: In our course, there are 80% of students got placed. Top companies come to our course. HR and manager are roles offered in our course. The highest package is 10 LPA and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. 75% of students got a job in our course and got into top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has some greenery, projectors in classrooms, limited AC in labs, and ethernet connections. Hostel rooms have individual Wi-Fi, and the food is decent with non-veg served 6 days a week. But sports facilities are limited. Overall, it's okay.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It has good placements, interactive teaching, regular events, and a balanced syllabus structure.

review_content.Placements: I am currently pursuing B.Tech IT (2nd year) at Vel Tech Multi Tech Engineering College, Avadi. The placement opportunities in our college are truly impressive. More than 100 top companies visited the campus this year. In our department alone, a majority of students got placed in reputed companies like Zoho, Infosys, CTS, TCS, Capgemini, Mu Sigma, and Tech Mahindra. Placement training starts from the 2nd year itself, and in the 3rd year, we get training from industry experts, and the actual placement process begins by then. The placement cell is very active and supportive.

individual_reviews.title: The college is good, but the infrastructure and bus facilities are poor, and no events are conducted

content.Placements: My college students are placed with good packages. I think the highest package is above 20 LPA, and the average is 6 to 4 LPA, with the lowest at 2 LPA. Mahendra, TCS, and some other companies recruit from our college. The top role offered is engineering. Regarding roles, there are no replies for interviews in the 1st year. I think from the 2nd year, they can do internships/interviews.
content.Infrastructure: All are some good aspects, but the infrastructure is a little worse compared to other colleges. There are no direct bus facilities to college, and no other models of transport, only college buses are available, and they only run at college opening and closing times. The hostel is okay, and foods are also okay, but sports and games are poor.

paragraphs: Vel Tech Multi Tech admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Vel Tech Multi Tech considers scores in GATE, CEETA, and TANCET for admission to specific courses.Vel Tech Multi Techoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,50,000 - 2,20,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 35,000 - 50,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

hostel_campus.college_name: Vel Tech Multi Tech Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but the infrastructure and bus facilities are poor, and no events are conducted
reviews.review_text: All are some good aspects, but the infrastructure is a little worse compared to other colleges. There are no direct bus facilities to college, and no other models of transport, only college buses are available, and they only run at college opening and closing times. The hostel is okay, and foods are also okay, but sports and games are poor.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vel Tech Multi Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College,
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs are available. The library is extraordinary. The quality of usage of the hostel is not good. The canteen food is good compared to other colleges. The canteen and medical rooms are available so there is no need to worry.

reviews.review_heading: You prefer the college for the placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has some greenery, projectors in classrooms, limited AC in labs, and ethernet connections. Hostel rooms have individual Wi-Fi, and the food is decent with non-veg served 6 days a week. But sports facilities are limited. Overall, it's okay.

reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, interactive teaching, regular events, and a balanced syllabus structure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is overall good, but there are some network issues as the college is located in a town. However, Wi-Fi is available inside the labs for academic purposes. Classrooms are neat, and each department has its own seminar hall. There are multiple labs, while some need improvement, but many are well-maintained. I do not know much about the hostel, but from what I have heard, it is okay and safe. For day scholars, there are 2-3 canteens, and the food is good. Sports and games are enco...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of some faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel facilities are above good. The food in the canteen and mess are also great. Medical facilities are available, sports facilities are available but the staff doesn't allow students to spend time in sports and entertainment.

reviews.review_heading: Average campus life and placement, but good for low cost.
reviews.review_text: All facilities and infrastructure are available like lab, Wi-Fi, classrooms, and seminar hall, but all of them were poor in quality of the service provided for all the courses. I am a day scholar, but the hostel facilities and the quality of the food they provide are below average. Only basic medical service is available.

reviews.review_heading: Not worthy of money, not worthy of life!
reviews.review_text: The labs are very bad but clean. The devices in the lab are not working properly. In the medical room, there is no required table or other facilities. There is no importance to sports. The food at the college mess is very poor. The food at the outside canteen is good as well.

reviews.review_heading: They have good placement and strict college with good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The labs at this college are not too expensive, but don't expect too much from them as they're just average. The hostel has two common facilities per floor, and the staff treats us like family. The canteen food is okay, but the ambience is always open. Sports facilities are good, and the college also has NCC.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, and the hostel is well-maintained and clean. The food is also good, with three options available for meals. In terms of medical support, if there are any health issues, they provide medication immediately. They regularly conduct sports and cultural events and activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vel Tech Multitech College located in the Avadi region.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the infrastructure is good, and there is a green atmosphere. Wi-Fi facilities are available, and the classrooms are well-maintained. We have a library to enhance students' knowledge. The canteen food is moderate, but the hostel canteen food is good in terms of taste.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vel Tech Multi Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Veltech infrastructure is awesome because there are separate blocks. There are around 30 blocks in the university campus. Hostel is very good and provides 6 days of non-vegetarian food. The food is extremely delicious. There is no ragging in the hostel as well as on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I think it was a good college .
reviews.review_text: The hostel infrastructure was good and coming to food there will be separate for veg and non veg. We have 4 libraries in college and we have Wi-Fi all over the campus and hostel. We have nonveg food everyday and the food is good. We have a gym and auditorium in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great. All necessary facilities are available. Our classrooms have whiteboards and projectors. Laboratories are better. The libraries are well maintained. Sports centers are available. Hostels are very good. The food quality is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vel Tech Multi Tech Dr.Rangarajan Dr.Sakunthala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The college has pleasant atmosphere. The hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: The Veltech Group colleges are better to study at, but you get the extra knowledge on your own.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average, and some of the departments have better ones than others. The infrastructure is average because in the lab they use old equipment and there are no a/c or Wi-Fi labs. Hostels are the worst because of their unsanitary food and mess, but private canteen foods are affordable, tasty, and clean.

review_summary.college_name: TKM Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college for engineering.

content.Placements: An average number of placements is happening in the college. Various companies come every year. Most of the companies are IT-based, and only some come for core subjects like EEE. The highest package till now this year is 21 LPA from Juspay. Companies like Oracle and Commvault also visit.
content.Infrastructure: Nice infrastructure is there in the college. With minimal space and campus size, the college is well maintained with facilities like various labs, central library, sports grounds, an idea lab, etc. Classrooms are also decent. Hostel facilities are good, but the food quality is poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and package.

content.Placements: Placements are good in the college. I am a final year Electrical student, but I can sit in most of the IT companies. Companies like Justpay, Oracle, Commvault, etc. Come to our campus with the highest package like 21LPA, 27LPA, and 33LPA. Most students who attend the placements get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Buildings, classrooms, and other facilities are well maintained and clean. All labs, including the Idea lab and the central library, are there with AC. Sports facilities are also available. Hostel facilities are good, but the food is bad. Hostel feels is also very high.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent engineering college in Kerala.

content.Placements: Placements are good, and a good number of packages are coming to the college. Top companies like Oracle and Juspay hire from here. The highest package offered was 21 LPA this year, and average goes around 4-5 LPA. Core companies also come like Snider, Anora, etc., with below 10 LPA. Overall, it's good.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure is available in the college. Campus is very near and clean, and facilities are also available within the college. Hostel is outside the college campus area. Hostel fees are very high, and the food is not good. Almost 7k per month. Hostel facilities are decently good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the overall performance.

content.Placements: College placements are good enough for IT roles only. Core companies are fewer for branches like Electrical, Electronics, Civil, etc. CS core companies come with high packages, but other branch package goes around 5 LPA only. Top IT companies are Juspay, Oracle, Commvault, etc.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is decent, but not that good. The campus area is very different compared to other colleges in Kerala, but most of the facilities are available. A central library with Wi-Fi and AC is there. Hostel facilities are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is not very great for civil engineering students.

content.Placements: Almost all students who attended the placements got placed. The highest package offered this year is 21 LPA for IT companies. A few core companies like TCS, etc., visit the college to hire civil students with a low package that ranges from 4-5 LPA. We have to select IT roles for better packages.
content.Infrastructure: Decent infrastructure and buildings are available on the campus. The campus size is small, as compared to other government engineering colleges in Kerala. faqs.question: What are the details required to check the KEAM result?
faqs.answer: To check KEAM result candidates have to enter application number, password and security code, as shown on the login screen. KEAM result can be checked in the online mode only on the official website. To check the result, Visit the official website follow the steps given below:Navigate to KEAM candidate login portal and enter application number, password and security code.Click on KEAM results.Scorecard will be displayed on the screen.The KEAM result will not be sent personally to anyone and the candidates have to check it from the official website once the result is out.First, candidates will be able to check the KEAM scores under the respective logins and then candidates will be able to check the KEAM rank list PDF on the official website.

hostel_campus.college_name: TKM Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Nice infrastructure is there in the college. With minimal space and campus size, the college is well maintained with facilities like various labs, central library, sports grounds, an idea lab, etc. Classrooms are also decent. Hostel facilities are good, but the food quality is poor.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and package.
reviews.review_text: Buildings, classrooms, and other facilities are well maintained and clean. All labs, including the Idea lab and the central library, are there with AC. Sports facilities are also available. Hostel facilities are good, but the food is bad. Hostel feels is also very high.

reviews.review_heading: Decent engineering college in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure is available in the college. Campus is very near and clean, and facilities are also available within the college. Hostel is outside the college campus area. Hostel fees are very high, and the food is not good. Almost 7k per month. Hostel facilities are decently good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the overall performance.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is decent, but not that good. The campus area is very different compared to other colleges in Kerala, but most of the facilities are available. A central library with Wi-Fi and AC is there. Hostel facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: It is not very great for civil engineering students.
reviews.review_text: Decent infrastructure and buildings are available on the campus. The campus size is small, as compared to other government engineering colleges in Kerala. Hostel facilities are good, but the food here is very bad and tastes pathetic. The fee is Rs. 7,000, which is very high.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the overall performance.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is good and very well maintained with respect to the neatness, sanitation, etc. All kinds of facilities are provided, like a central library with AC and Wi-Fi, labs like Idea Lab, etc. Hostel facilities are good except for the food. Very high fees are around 7k per month.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: Good college infrastructure is there with neat and well-maintained surroundings and other areas. All facilities like labs, libraries, workshops, etc., are there with good equipments and tools. Hostel facilities are also good but poor food is available with very high fees.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Decent infrastructure is available in the college. Facilities like a library, labs, workshops, grounds, etc., are available. Hostel facilities are decent, but the food served is pathetic. The fee charged is very high for the mess. The previous month's fee was around Rs. 7,000.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and other maintenance of the campus are good. All kinds of facilities are available on the campus like central library, idea lab, sees rooms, machine lab, etc. Quality of facilities is also good. Hostel is decent except for the mess food.

reviews.review_heading: A really good college in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure is available in the college. All lab facilities are there, like electrical, CAD lab, machines, etc. A central library is also available. Sports facilities are also good. The hostel is decent. The food is not great. Hostel fees are very high, around 6-7k per month.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the college infrastructure is nice and well-maintained. The campus area is smaller than other government engineering colleges. The hostel is also decent, but the fees are very high.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the placements.
reviews.review_text: infrastructure is good, though with a limited campus area. Unlike other government colleges in Kerala or India, TKM has a very small campus area, but it's maintained very well with proper hygiene and sanitation. Hostel facilities are decent, but the mess food is pathetic.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the college placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is not that great. It's very small. Hostels are outside the main campus in the civil area. But it's maintained properly. Other government colleges are big but not very well maintained. The hostel is decent only but the food is not good. Just eatable kind of food is there. The fee charged is very high.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent engineering college in Kerala.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent and well-maintained. Although, it's not as big as other government colleges in Kerala. It is well-built and maintained. Almost all the lab and sports facilities are available. The hostel facilities are decent but the fee is too high. Food is just eatable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I'm satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is decent. Lab facilities are good. Idea labs are also available. Library is well-stocked and equipped with AC. Hostel food quality is very poor and fees are very high. I do not recommend it. A campus doctor is available. Sports facilities are available and are promoted.

likes.text: Most of the top companies of india had showed up on our campus, Also frequent internships held by top institutions are conducted in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Good in terms of money, but the teachers are biased towards certain students.

review_content.Placements: No placements cell exists in the college. There is no internship opportunity provide by the college. In this College, not even a single company visits for hiring. The college offers courses of Computer Science, Mechanical, Electronics and Agriculture. The faculty members of this college are not so educated. There are only 3 faculty members who teach all the students from 1 till 4th year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel condition is good, but the condition of the college infrastructure is too low, even in the classrooms there are no proper seats. All the seats are broken while some are good. Bathrooms of the hostel are not clean, they are dirty, but on Sunday, they do regular cleaning. There are no doors in some of the bathrooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very dissatisfactory due to various aspects present.

review_content.Placements: Some small companies, like Zebronics, come for placement, but most students reject their offers because they are too small. The average package offered is 3-4 LPA. Maximum students secure internships and jobs by putting in hard work on their own. If you want to get a good job, you have to do the hard work.
review_content.Infrastructure: College is good, but due to a lack of maintenance, it is becoming worse every day. There is dust in all the rooms. Even the hostel is not in good condition; the glass of all the windows is broken, and dogs wander here and there. The mess food is not good. There was a canteen that was shut down because no one would go there. There is an annual sports meet held in college, which is good.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: How much salary does an Engineer get?
overview_faqs.answer: Many companies offer great salary packages in metro cities which are hub for IT companies as well as other reputed MNCs. The salary also differs as per the entry level. After gaining experience of 2-5 years, you can expect a salary of 8-12 LPA and then shift from technical to managerial roles.Know more about -Engineering Career

review_summary.college_name: Baba Saheb Dr. Bhim Rao Ambedkar College of Agricultural Engineering & Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: About my college life.

content.Placements: In this college, placements come for only the agriculture or dairy branch, not for all branches like B.Tech, CSE, or ECE. This college does not provide any good placement offers to students and internships also, so this is good for teaching branches and not for non-teaching fields.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure or campus life is quite good for students the hostels are available but there are not clean But this college hostel have many rooms so you can get your personal room for study and this is my personal review for hostel I study in my room.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Dairy Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is how a regular-looking college changed my life.

content.Placements: I am still in my second year, but we are still allowed to see the interviews and the questions asked. Placement is 100 percent. Surprisingly, the top recruiters are Amul and Mother Dairy. Top role is Research and Development manager. Highest salary package is around 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms have projectors, whiteboards, and Wi-Fi (though occasionally inconsistent). Labs are well-equipped, with a specialized setup for technical courses. Spacious, air-conditioned library offers books, journals, databases, and study zones. Hostel rooms are clean and basic, with beds, desks, wardrobes, and round-the-clock water and electricity. Some blocks have variable-speed Wi-Fi. Mess food is hygienic with veg/non-veg weekly menu and festive meals. Canteen serves affordable snacks and meals, often a student hangout. Also provides on-campus clinic with doctor visits, hospital tie-ups, and ample sports grounds, courts, and a gym.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Good in terms of money, but the teachers are biased towards certain students.

content.Placements: No placements cell exists in the college. There is no internship opportunity provide by the college. In this College, not even a single company visits for hiring. The college offers courses of Computer Science, Mechanical, Electronics and Agriculture. The faculty members of this college are not so educated. There are only 3 faculty members who teach all the students from 1 till 4th year.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel condition is good, but the condition of the college infrastructure is too low, even in the classrooms there are no proper seats. All the seats are broken while some are good. Bathrooms of the hostel are not clean, they are dirty, but on Sunday, they do regular cleaning. There are no doors in some of the bathrooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is very dissatisfactory due to various aspects present.

content.Placements: Some small companies, like Zebronics, come for placement, but most students reject their offers because they are too small. The average package offered is 3-4 LPA. Maximum students secure internships and jobs by putting in hard work on their own. If you want to get a good job, you have to do the hard work.
content.Infrastructure: College is good, but due to a lack of maintenance, it is becoming worse every day. There is dust in all the rooms. Even the hostel is not in good condition; the glass of all the windows is broken, and dogs wander here and there. The mess food is not good. There was a canteen that was shut down because no one would go there. There is an annual sports meet held in college, which is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied by the faculty and placements. Campus life is not good either.

content.Placements: Placements are not good. Very few students get campus placements. There is no specific placement cell in the college. Overall, there are no campus placements in the Computer Science Branch. Not only in Computer Science, but in all branches, there are very low campus placements. You have to apply off-campus to get placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is average to good. Basically, this is a college for B.Tech agricultural students. This college is not for CS or technical branches. In the computer lab, only 3-4 computers are in working condition. And all computers are of an older generation.

reviews.review_heading: This is an excellent college, so I am satisfied with its facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It provides free Wi-Fi 24X7, a hostel, and a library. Classrooms have the best seating arrangements. It has smart classes for presentations. The hostel is good. The food quality is also good. The hostel has a separate room for each student.

reviews.review_heading: Unbiased review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Yes we have Wi-Fi but it have the limit of 1gb per mobile in one day like the railway used to have. And we have labs but half of the computers does not work. Classrooms conditions is good for study atmosphere and library is excellent and most of the course books are available there. Quality of hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Literally, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are no on-campus placements, but the student of the Computer Science branch gets off placements easily in some top MNCs like TCS, WIPRO, IBM, INFOSYS, and many other top startups that offer off-campus placements. Students get a chance to do an internship in the 6th & 7th semesters from the college.

reviews.review_heading: In short, the college is good for those who just want to do the graduation. That's it.
reviews.review_text: 1) The Wi-Fi labs are there. Even in all the hostels, there is 24X7 internet connectivity with a good bandwidth and speed. 2) We have a good campus overall; several sports and games are organised by SES (Students Engineering Society). 3) The labs are good and the classrooms too. 4) The quality of food is average in the hostels, and there is no canteen, but the nearby shops are available as well. 5) The hostel rooms are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Come and start your studies with BBAU.
reviews.review_text: The engineering section is well-placed, and the infrastructure of the university is in good condition. There is a big library on campus, digital boards are available in classrooms for better study, and there is a big playground for students to enjoy.

reviews.review_heading: I am not happy through this college. I have taken admission in the worst college ever.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. All the instructions and instruments are also available but dean and higher authority are very lazy in doing work. College location is good but you will know one of the worst thing that college is not having any water facility.

college_info.intro: Assam Don Bosco University offers courses such as BTech and MBA as some of the flagship programmes which are also the most desired by the candidates to pursue. Admission to courses such as BTech is offered based on minimum aggregate of 45% secured in Class 12. Whereas, for courses such as MBA, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation. faqs.question: How are Assam Don Bosco University MBA placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can join without JEE. However, if you don't appear within the JEE Mains then the University offers admission in B.Tech through 3 access options. JEE Main, Don Bosco University GET, or Assam CEE. If you haven't cleared the JEE Main examination or the State Entrance test, you may also practice for the DBU-GET. However, the entrance exam is necessary for admission to B.Tech at Assam Don Bosco University.
faqs.question: Can I join Assam Don Bosco University without JEE Mains for BTech?

faqs.answer: A:    While applying for BTech admission at Assam Don Bosco Universit, applicants are required to submit the relavent documents supporting their eligibility. These required documents should be uploaded during the application process on the university's official website as part of the application form submission. The university has specified a detailed list of such documents. The same has been listed below:Originals of mark sheets for verificationProof of date of birthCaste/Tribe/ Community certificate if applicableStudent health form duly filled
faqs.question: What are the documents required during BTech admission process at ADBU?

faqs.answer: A:    Don Bosco University admissions are based on scores obtained from various entrance exams. The entrance exams accepted for B.Tech are the JEE Main and the DBU-GET. Most other UG programs do not require an entrance exam, but candidates must meet the minimum eligibility requirements for each program. MBA candidates are required to take any of the entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, CMAT, JMAT, XAT, GMAT and DBU-PGET. M.Tech candidates do not need to take an entrance exam for admission to the M.Tech program, but they must have a minimum 60% marks in the qualifying UG degree with a good academic record.
faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Assam Don Bosco University for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee for MBA at Don Bosco University in Assam is Rs. 600. You can visit the MBA program or admission page on the official website of Assam Don Bosco University. You can research the application process. The application price should be found on the official website. The university transcript can be downloaded. The letter usually includes information about admission procedures, fees, and so on. The cover letter should include application information. The total cost of the Assam Don Bosco University program is Rs 3,60,000. Total tuition is subject to change each year based on a number of variables including specialization chosen and co-payments.

review_content.Placements: There are many placement opportunities as well as internship programs in the college. review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities offered in the college are quite satisfactory and resourceful. Most classrooms are fitted with smart boards and Wi-Fi connections, which make learning very interactive and interesting. The library is also full of quality books and has the space necessary for studying. There is also an infirmary and three canteens having a variety of food items.

review_content.Placements: As I am pursuing BBA at Assam Don Bosco University Azara, here the average package for BBA students is around Rs 2 to 3 Lacs per annum and the top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, HCL Infosystems, The Adecco Group, BSNL, Reliance Communications, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Microsoft, Wipro, SpiceJet, Shriram Value Services.
review_content.Infrastructure: As I am currently studying at Azara campus, here the college infrastructure is average. The campus is very small, non-air-conditioned classrooms, sports facilities are not also good, but some of the factors such as the library, classroom seats, and digital classrooms are really impressive. If we talk about hostel infrastructure, it is very disappointing. Around 60-70% of first-year students leave the hostel after the first year, the reason being hostel strictness. If you are an outgoing person, just want to inform you that hostel gates are closed after 6 pm. If we talk about food, they provide veg and non-veg options, but the quantity is very less. The water facility is not really good, and toilets are not clean.

faqs.answer: No, Assam Don Bosco University BCom (Hons) admission is subject to fulfilment of the preset eligibility criteria. The university provides admission to only those applicants who submit the application form timely and meet the prescribed eligibility requirements. However, the selection of the applicants is based on an entrance exam, followed by the PI round. To pursue the university's BCom (Hons) course, applicants must have passed Class 12 or equivalent examination from a recognised board. They must have scored at least 50% aggregate in Class 12 or equivalent examination. Selected candidates are issued admission offer letters by the university.

course_faqs.answer: Yes, there is a semester pattern that prevails in the case of BCom at Assam Don Bosco University. This undergraduate programme is subdivided into two semesters each academic year.
