overview_faqs.question: Does Assam Don Bosco University refund fees?
overview_faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco offers fee refunds under certain conditions. However, the details vary from case to case. If you withdraw your application and apply for a fee refund before the commencement of the academic year, you can get a partial refund after deducting Rs.1000 as an administrative charge. If you fail to meet the eligibility criteria for admission by 31st October of the year in which you applied, you will get a partial refund, after deducting a pro rated amount of tuition fees and annual fees along with the administrative charge. Once the academic year begins, you will not be able to apply for fee refunds. The detailed refund policy for different scenarios can be found on the university’s website.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for D.Pharma course at Assam Don Bosco University?
overview_faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco University offers two Pharmacy courses, BPharma and DPharma. For admission to both courses, candidates are required to fill out separate application forms. After filling out the form, they must pay the below-mentioned application fee to successfully apply:CourseApplication Fees BPharma/DPharmaINR 600Note: The below mentioned fee is taken form the official sources. It is subject to change and, hence, inductive.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for the MBA programme at Assam Don Bosco University?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for MBA at Don Bosco University in Assam is Rs. 600. You can visit the MBA program or admission page on the official website of Assam Don Bosco University. You can research the application process. The application price should be found on the official website. The university transcript can be downloaded. The letter usually includes information about admission procedures, fees, and so on. The cover letter should include application information. The total cost of the Assam Don Bosco University program is Rs 3,60,000. Total tuition is subject to change each year based on a number of variables including specialization chosen and co-payments.

overview_faqs.question: Can I use any online payment application to pay fee at Assam Don Bosco University?
overview_faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco University offers online and offline mode of payment. The modes of online payment include credit/debit cards or Netbanking. Candidates can also opt for offline payment need to send a Demand Draft in favour of Assam Don Bosco University.

review_summary.college_name: Assam Don Bosco University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The campus is beautiful, and the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.

content.Placements: Since the Chemistry department encourages students to pursue their careers in research, there are limited placements. Only teaching-related recruiters come to the college and offer an average salary of 4 LPA. This year, recruiters like Avanti Group, Azim Premji Foundation, and some local colleges came.
content.Infrastructure: Fans, bunk beds, and cupboards are provided in excellent condition, with two plug sockets for every student. Food is not provided in the hostel, one must buy from canteens and eat, but it's very affordable. The process for registration of the hostel starts during the time of admission. To book a slot, we paid 1000. The hostel is quite affordable at 15,000 per semester, which is like 2,500 per month. I have not rented a PG, but my friends have in the Sonapur or Kamerkuchi locality.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The campus is very beautiful, plus the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.

content.Placements: I am in my first year here, so opportunities for me were not quite many. Seniors got opportunities from companies like Amazon, Google, Microsoft, TATA, Wadhwani Foundation, Internshala, etc. There were opportunities often. One can prepare for competitive exams well.
content.Infrastructure: There were usually 3 fests every month, held by various departments, which include food fest, music fest, Mental health conferences, cultural fest, etc. The library was stacked with various books and journals. Novels by famous as well as underrated authors, Research papers, Theses, Self help books, etc. There were projectors in every classroom, labs, and proper facilities available for B.Sc. students, computer rooms, photography room, journalism room, editorial room, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Assam Don Bosco University, Azara.

content.Placements: There are many placement opportunities as well as internship programs in the college. Even this year, a good number of students got placements after their internships, about 30%. The companies usually belong to the banking and marketing sectors, and the salaries offered range from Rs.20,000 to Rs.40,000, which is quite enough for an entry-level job, especially in the northeast regions.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities offered in the college are quite satisfactory and resourceful. Most classrooms are fitted with smart boards and Wi-Fi connections, which make learning very interactive and interesting. The library is also full of quality books and has the space necessary for studying. There is also an infirmary and three canteens having a variety of food items.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall review for Assam Don Bosco University Azara campus for BBA students.

content.Placements: As I am pursuing BBA at Assam Don Bosco University Azara, here the average package for BBA students is around Rs 2 to 3 Lacs per annum and the top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, HCL Infosystems, The Adecco Group, BSNL, Reliance Communications, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Microsoft, Wipro, SpiceJet, Shriram Value Services.
content.Infrastructure: As I am currently studying at Azara campus, here the college infrastructure is average. The campus is very small, non-air-conditioned classrooms, sports facilities are not also good, but some of the factors such as the library, classroom seats, and digital classrooms are really impressive. If we talk about hostel infrastructure, it is very disappointing. Around 60-70% of first-year students leave the hostel after the first year, the reason being hostel strictness. If you are an outgoing person, just want to inform you that hostel gates are closed after 6 pm. If we talk about food, they provide veg and non-veg options, but the quantity is very less. The water facility is not really good, and toilets are not clean.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My experience in university is good but dissatisfied with the campus

content.Placements: Placement is not taken important in our university. There is placement staff who invites the recruiter for interview so one who are interested go for the interview. Since I didn't go for interview I don't know the highest or lowest package offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are average. There is wifi but I can say it's useless. Labs are good and classrooms are also good there is single seats available for all the students. Hostel is also there for both boys and girls I don't know about the mess and all. 2 canteens are there in campus. Sports and games are good.

admission_overview.college_name: Assam Don Bosco University Admission 2025: Application Process, Selection Criteria, Entrance Exams & Updates

admission_overview.title: Assam Don Bosco University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Assam Don Bosco University admission process 2025 is based on both entrance exam and merit for UG and PG courses. ADBU admissions are opne now, and interested candidates can apply online on the official website of the university. ADBU - Assam Don Bosco University, the only university in private sector with NAAC 'A' Grade in Assam, offers a wide range of programmes at UG, PG, doctoral, and diploma level including BTech, BSc, BCom, MBA, MTech, MSW etc. Admission to BTech and MBA programmes is done on the basis of entrance tests JEE Mains/ Advanced, and MAT/ CAT, respectively.

eligibility_selection.title: Assam Don Bosco University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Those who do not appear for JEE or State Entrance Tests must appear for Don Bosco University Graduate Entrance Test (DBU-GET). The DBU-GET for BTech programme will evaluate the candidates on their proficiency in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics at the Class 12 level. The duration of the Entrance Test is three hours. Below are the Assam Don Bosco University eligibility and selection criteria details for UG & PG courses:

admission_process.title: Assam Don Bosco University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Assam Don Bosco University is open for admission now. Candidates can apply online and pay the application fee. Once the candidates make a payment for application fee, the Admission Office will schedule an entrance test/ interview for them, and the details will be informed to them personally.
Below is the step-by-step process for Assam Don Bosco University admission:
Step 1: ADBU Application
Candidates must apply online through the official website of Assam Don Bosco University @dbuniversity.ac.in
Step 2: ADBU Selection Process
Entrance Test (DBU) and Personal Interview will be conducted on the same day.
Step 3: ADBU Documents Submission
Candidates must submit the following documents at the time of admission,
Step 4: ADBU Admission Fees Payment

Candidates who are qualified for admission are to pay the admission fees (non-refundable) before 5:00 pm on the day of admission. The balance fees payable are to be paid within 7 days. The payment may be made via PayTM / GooglePay / BHIM or online at the admission portal of the university/ a NEFT to the university account(Axis Bank,Khanapara, Assam Don Bosco University A/C Don Bosco Society).
Please note that no fees will be accepted in cash or cheque.

placement_data.title: Assam Don Bosco University (ADBU) Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Assam Don Bosco University placement team is always working hard to find and create job opportunities for students. They collaborate closely with the students, who are a key part of the team, to make sure the students gain the best exposure to the corporate world. The University is yet to release its placement report for 2025 however, the NIRF Report for 2025 has been released. In all 208 students scured placements during Assam Don Bosco University placements. Out of these 208 students, a total of 42 UG 3-year students scured placements with a highest package of INR 3.41 LPA .When compared with last year, the median package has increased from INR 1.92 LPA to INR 3.41 LPA, presenting an increase of 77.60%. The median packages for UG 4-year and PG 2-year stood at INR 3.68 LPA and INR 2.76 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: Does Assam Don Bosco University refund fees?
faqs.answer: Assam Don Bosco offers fee refunds under certain conditions. However, the details vary from case to case. If you withdraw your application and apply for a fee refund before the commencement of the academic year, you can get a partial refund after deducting Rs.1000 as an administrative charge. If you fail to meet the eligibility criteria for admission by 31st October of the year in which you applied, you will get a partial refund, after deducting a pro rated amount of tuition fees and annual fees along with the administrative charge. Once the academic year begins, you will not be able to apply for fee refunds. The detailed refund policy for different scenarios can be found on the university’s website.

hostel_campus.college_name: Assam Don Bosco University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
The University offers separate hostel accommodation for boys and girls. The boy's hostel named as Carreno Hall managed and run exclusively for DBCET students by Don Bosco Society, Azara. The girl's hostel is managed and runs exclusively for DBCET students by Ferrando Developmental Educational Welfare Society. 

These hostels offer a number of facilities for students such as:
Well-furnished rooms with wifi enabled
High-speed Internet and Intranet services
Safe drinking water
Round the clock security
Television in common room
Hygienically prepared vegetarian and non-vegetarian food

library.description: The Library with its modern collection of knowledge resources and innovative information services provides necessary supports for teaching, learning, research activities of the University by creating state-of-the-art facilities to the academic community. The entire Library collections are made available through OPAC. The Library is now partially automated using Koha ILMS for running its housekeeping operation which is an integrated system connected to all the three campuses i.e, Azara, Tapesia & Kharguli campus network, providing online access to catalog & e-resource facility. The Library offers a range of information services to support the learning process set to the highest professional standards.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: The campus is beautiful, and the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.
reviews.review_text: Fans, bunk beds, and cupboards are provided in excellent condition, with two plug sockets for every student. Food is not provided in the hostel, one must buy from canteens and eat, but it's very affordable. The process for registration of the hostel starts during the time of admission. To book a slot, we paid 1000. The hostel is quite affordable at 15,000 per semester, which is like 2,500 per month. I have not rented a PG, but my friends have in the Sonapur or Kamerkuchi locality.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is very beautiful, plus the food in each canteen is very clean and hygienic.
reviews.review_text: There were usually 3 fests every month, held by various departments, which include food fest, music fest, Mental health conferences, cultural fest, etc. The library was stacked with various books and journals. Novels by famous as well as underrated authors, Research papers, Theses, Self help books, etc. There were projectors in every classroom, labs, and proper facilities available for B.Sc. students, computer rooms, photography room, journalism room, editorial room, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Assam Don Bosco University, Azara.
reviews.review_text: Facilities offered in the college are quite satisfactory and resourceful. Most classrooms are fitted with smart boards and Wi-Fi connections, which make learning very interactive and interesting. The library is also full of quality books and has the space necessary for studying. There is also an infirmary and three canteens having a variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: Overall review for Assam Don Bosco University Azara campus for BBA students.
reviews.review_text: As I am currently studying at Azara campus, here the college infrastructure is average. The campus is very small, non-air-conditioned classrooms, sports facilities are not also good, but some of the factors such as the library, classroom seats, and digital classrooms are really impressive. If we talk about hostel infrastructure, it is very disappointing. Around 60-70% of first-year students leave the hostel after the first year, the reason being hostel strictness. If you are an outgoing person, ...

reviews.review_heading: My experience in university is good but dissatisfied with the campus
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average. There is wifi but I can say it's useless. Labs are good and classrooms are also  good there is single seats available for all the students. Hostel is also there for both boys and girls I don't know about the mess and all. 2 canteens are there in campus. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: I also like the simplicity of the campus and easy access to the library.
reviews.review_text: In one room, 4 people have to stay. The room is small, though the placement of your property (bed, cupboard, table) is arranged in such a way that you don't feel occupied by them. They provide shower-type, basin-type bathrooms. And for the food, they don't have a kitchen in hostels. But they have canteens near every hostel block. So no pre-payment of foods; you will have to buy the food at the moment and eat. But nothing to be worried about the prices. It's affordable. For thalis, they range 50-...

reviews.review_heading: The college environment is very good, nice, and clean.
reviews.review_text: My overall experience in the college is very nice. I love being a part of this college experience. Many kinds of programs are held on our college campus, like DBIM fest, etc. There are plenty of books and journals in the college library, and the classes are fully equipped with smart boards.

reviews.review_heading: College atmosphere is well and good.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities were amazing, and the cost was also affordable. Even though there were no food facilities in the hostels, we had four canteens inside the campus, which were cheap and the food was also tasty. Hostel wardens were very caring and sincere, and in case of any medical emergency, they were always there. There were different clubs as well, for example, music, dance, art & craft, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of M.Sc.  Zoology at Assam don bosco university.
reviews.review_text: Awesome Don Bosco University provides grade infrastructure for the student of M.Sc.  Zoology as they provides online library services We need clean classrooms which are fully ventilated and air-conditioned. hostel facility is also there, and queer students got five-time food, 24/7 Wi-Fi and electricity services. They also integrated medical insurance.

reviews.review_heading: Assam Don Bosco University Provides Excellent Facilities in the M.A. English Course
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent and attractive, featuring well-maintained classrooms, fully equipped labs and online library facilities. They also provide hostel facilities with five meals a day, prioritizing student safety.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in Assam Don Bosco University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the university are average. We get Wi-Fi, whose speed is around 30 Mbps, with around 10 computer labs and specific rooms for the engineering students. There is a library, which is the best infrastructure that is provided, as many kinds of books can be found in it. There are four floors of classrooms and each specific department has its own staff rooms and toilets. The hostel provides a fairly good infrastructure, and I will agree that the environment around it is very ...

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities are provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: Rooms are pretty large and so we have 4 members in each room, fully furnished rooms with 4 fans one for each one of us. The study table is attached to the bed plus 1 drawer, 2 slots below it, and a cupboard with 3 slots. Currently, we have 3 canteens as the college is very large each near hostels, the canteen provides 3-time meals and you have to buy a couple each time you eat, there are different departments selling Indian, Chinese, Tribal food and many more. So the food money is not included i...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members were amicable in nature.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are excellent and spacious, with reasonable rent, providing a clean and conducive environment for studying. The food is also good, resembling a home-cooked meal. The average cost for both UG and PG students is 27,000 for 6 months. The hostel is located within the campus, allowing parents to visit their children anytime. External expenses range from Rs. 2000 to Rs. 4000.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members were very friendly in nature.
reviews.review_text: Our rooms are quite large, accommodating 4 members in each room. They are fully furnished with 4 fans, one for each occupant. The room includes a study table attached to the bed, with 1 drawer, 2 slots below it, and a cupboard with 3 slots. Currently, there are 3 canteens in the college, each situated near hostels. The canteen provides three meals a day, and you have to buy a coupon each time you eat. Different departments sell Indian, Chinese, Tribal food, and more. The food expenses are not in...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members were very friendly in nature.
reviews.review_text: Our rooms are pretty large, so we have 4 members in each room, fully furnished rooms with 4 fans, one for each of us. And the study table attached to the bed, plus 1 drawer, 2 slots below it, and a cupboard with 3 slots. Currently, we have 3 canteens as the college is very large, each near a hostel. faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Ahmedabad Institute of Technology?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Ahmedabad Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Ahmedabad Institute of Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Ahmedabad Institute of Technology courses stands around INR 1,21,800 to 2,98,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Ahmedabad Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering/Technology from a recognized board.M.E./M.TechAll Non-GATE candidates including sponsored (Non-GATE) shall have to appear in PGCET-2022 to become eligible for admission.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor Degree of minimum 3 years duration with mentioned marks from any recognized university/institute. Final year students can also apply on provisional basis.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Ahmedabad Institute of Technology for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Ahmedabad Institute of Technology is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Ahmedabad Institute of Technology are Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Cyber Security.
faqs.question: What specializations do Ahmedabad Institute of Technology offer in their courses?

faqs.answer: A:    Ahmedabad Institute of Technology provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM in streams such as Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Cyber Security.

faqs.answer: A:    The GSEB announced GUJCET merit list online for Ahmedabad Institute of Technology on the official website gujcet.gseb.org. Below are the instructions for checking the GUJCET merit list.Candidates must visit the official GUJCET website.Check a “GUJCET Results 2024” announcement in the official bulletin of GUJCET website.The candidate must click on the option “GUJCET Results 2024”.After being directed to the results page, the GUJCET Merit List 2024 will be shown and can be downloaded directly from the official page.Candidates must download the merit list website, which includes their name or application number as well as the marks they received.Further, here are the credentials required to fill out by the students while downloading the GUJCET merit list 2024 from the website:Name of the candidate.Admit Card Number of candidate.Overall and sectional-wise marks obtained in GUJCET exam.Rank acquired by the candidate in GUJCET exam.

overview_faqs.question: Is Ahmedabad Institute of Technology a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Ahmedabad Institute of Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Ahmedabad Institute of Technology has a rating of 3.52 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.65 on Campus Life, 2.97 on Placements, 3.79 on Faculty and 3.68 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Ahmedabad Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements and infrastructure, needs better industry exposure.

content.Placements: Ahmedabad Institute of Technology, established in 2004, offers various undergraduate and postgraduate programs, including B.E. in information technology. Approximately 80% of students from the information technology branch secure placements annually. The highest package is around 30 LPA. The average package is approximately 8 LPA. Around 60% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and equipped with projectors. Labs have good quality computers. Labs has a great environment. Library is well-stocked with books, research papers, and digital access. Canteen food quality is very good. Many types of food are available and also good as place of canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: In 2025, AIT is absolutely good for a Computer Engineering course as it provides digital boards.

content.Placements: Approximately 99% of students are doing jobs who passed out, so no need to worry about placements. The highest package is around 26 LPA, and the lowest package is around 4 LPA. 100% of students participate in placement interviews. So many students are working in Google, Apple, and Flipkart.
content.Infrastructure: They provide AC rooms with awesome seats and amazing digital boards. They also provide halls, canteens, triple parking, and 4 buildings for different courses. They maintain silence in the college, with 3 gardens and a canteen available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2024.

content.Placements: In my course, more than 100 students. In placement, my college is giving its best for high packages. 70 to 80 percent of students got internships from my college. In my course, top roles offered are the web development subject and also the artificial intelligence subject.
content.Infrastructure: Yes, mostly all the facilities are available in my college, like garden, library, canteen, sports, labs, and mineral water. Mostly all the books are available in our library. In the canteen, all fast foods are available, and healthy foods are also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely a great college in Ahmedabad.

content.Placements: The college atmosphere is very nice and comfortable for students. The faculty also helps students with their academics and careers. Individual faculty members assist students with placement offers and opportunities. The college conducts various seminars regarding placement opportunities and offers.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available in our college, like the library, Wi-Fi, and canteen, are well-managed. There are smart classrooms and well-managed labs. The college atmosphere is very important for students to study; our college is very good in that regard.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The campus life is great with minimal opportunity.

content.Placements: Placement opportunity is not as good as your aspect, but you can get an average package of 3–4 LPA. If you are planning to study masters abroad, this college is a good option due to being GTU affiliated. However, if you are looking for good on-campus placement, it is not a good choice.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are great and well designed to fulfill students' needs. They have good air conditioning and a smart board. The college campus is good and fulfills all the needs of students. It is not as good as some big colleges, but it is average and has decent infrastructure.

description: Ahmedabad Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

Ahmedabad Institute of Technology offers admission to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses based on national-level examinations. The institute offers BE courses based on valid JEE Main and GUJCET ranks. The institute also accepts ACPC ranks for admission to the ME specialisations. Ahmedabad Institute of Technology accepted exams along with the courses as follows:

The Ahmedabad Institute of Technology cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Ahmedabad Institute of Technology BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 12394 and 50637 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.E. in Mechanical Engineering. The fir

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.E. in Mechanical Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 12394 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary the least competitive specialisations for admission in 2024 were B.E. in Electrical Engineering and with closing cutoff ranks of and , respectively.

Ahmedabad Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Ahmedabad Institute of Technology can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Ahmedabad Institute of Technology GUJCET cutoff 2025 concluded with the final round cutoff list being published for various All India and Home State quota categories, like General, OBC, SC, etc. The cutoff was released for admission to B.E./ B.Tech course.
For the General HS category, the overall B.E./ B.Tech cutoff ranged from 14249 to 50626. According to the last round, the most competitive branch for admission was , followed by

This section provides the closing ranks for 2025, 2024, and 2023 for various categories, rounds, courses, and quotas. Students can refer to the table below to know the cutoff trend for the past 3 years.

In the final round for the General HS category, the Ahmedabad Institute of Technology B.E./ B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged from 14249 to 50626, wherein the toughest branch was B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering.

The Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC) released the GUJCET 2025 cutoffs for various participating institutions for admissions to all branches, rounds, categories, and quotas. reviews.review_heading: Decent placements and infrastructure, needs better industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious, well-lit, and equipped with projectors. Labs have good quality computers. Labs has a great environment. Library is well-stocked with books, research papers, and digital access. Canteen food quality is very good. Many types of food are available and also good as place of canteen.

reviews.review_heading: In 2025, AIT is absolutely good for a Computer Engineering course as it provides digital boards.
reviews.review_text: They provide AC rooms with awesome seats and amazing digital boards. They also provide halls, canteens, triple parking, and 4 buildings for different courses. They maintain silence in the college, with 3 gardens and a canteen available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, good placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Yes, mostly all the facilities are available in my college, like garden, library, canteen, sports, labs, and mineral water. Mostly all the books are available in our library. In the canteen, all fast foods are available, and healthy foods are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely a great college in Ahmedabad.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in our college, like the library, Wi-Fi, and canteen, are well-managed. There are smart classrooms and well-managed labs. The college atmosphere is very important for students to study; our college is very good in that regard.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life is great with minimal opportunity.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are great and well designed to fulfill students' needs. They have good air conditioning and a smart board. The college campus is good and fulfills all the needs of students. It is not as good as some big colleges, but it is average and has decent infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college, course, and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. There are four blocks. Libraries and labs are available. The administration block is separate from the other blocks. There is a cafeteria where students can sit and relax. Outdoor and indoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is very well maintained. The college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: As I have experienced, the college is well maintained, and the classrooms are also neat and clean. The library also has many books related to every field of engineering. The library is the best place to study. The classrooms are very well ventilated.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placements.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostels at the college. The college infrastructure is neither very good nor very bad. There are no games available at the college. There is no WiFi. The departments are good and very helpful to us. The food quality is good. Classrooms are good, and labs are also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my studies and my time at AIT.
reviews.review_text: There are plenty of classrooms for students to study in. For the students in their first year, AIT provides them with smart classes. For senior students, smart classes are used when they are needed to succeed, such as for presentations, etc. The food in the canteen is average. The seating is good in the canteen; there is even a seating area outside the canteen under shade where students can have their lunch. AIT is also surrounded by nature, with multiple play areas and grounds.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with the college campus and their fee structure.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities are not that good for our course; there are no proper classrooms for study. The library is excellent, and they have different books available for all courses.
Labs are also excellent.
The food quality is not that good, but they have good facilities for medical care and safety.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: I would like to say about the smart classes available in the college which are better than the normal classes. The library is also good, but sometimes it is too much crowded. There is also a playground where all the functions are held and also students play cricket in their leisure time.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very good and satisfying with their teaching methods.
reviews.review_text: Our college is very spacious, and all the required infrastructure is there and in good condition. The college also has a canteen for refreshments and lunch. And also have a good laboratory for learning practical skills on vehicles and different kinds of machines and software.

reviews.review_heading: Very helpful faculty members and a good environment on campus.
reviews.review_text: A canteen, library, sports ground, and many more facilities, as well as instructors for those activities, are provided by our institute. Good-quality food is provided by the mess and canteen, as are medical facilities, sports, and games provided by our institute.

reviews.review_heading: Our faculty are not good.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not have good facilities. There is no hostel, no transportation facilities, MAC, and no canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It is a place for different engineering courses.
reviews.review_text: Our college has smart classrooms, labs, a library, and 2 canteens. Wi-Fi and a hostel are not available. The playground is available for outdoor games but it does not have facilities for indoor games.

college_info.intro:
TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic offers various BTech and diploma courses across different disciplines. The institute offers the BTech programme in more than five branches listed below:
The BTech programme offered by TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic is highly popular due to its promising career prospects. The comprehensive curriculum offered by the institute blends theoretical knowledge with practical applications. The curriculum equips students with a solid foundation in various engineering areas. TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic regularly organises industry visits, guest lectures and internships to prepare students for the industry. The institute also offers placement assistance to students. The engineering graduates are placed in different sectors such as telecommunications, chip manufacturing, software development, automobile industry, chemical industry, cement industry, transportation industry, and textile industry, among others. Please find below the latest information about popular programmes offered by TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic along with other courses:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme in various branches at the UG level. The institute, through its various departments, offers the BTech programme in six branches, including Aeronautical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Data Science, Computer Science & Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering, among others. Additionally, TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic offers three-year diploma programmes in the following specialisations:

review_content.Placements: Most of the people without any backlogs or with lower grades are placed in multinational companies with industry-standard packages. The management constantly adds new updates to the infrastructure facilities throughout the year. College Wi-Fi is allotted to students if needed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: TOMS Engineering College Is always a better option

content.Placements: Almost 70% of the students got placement in good companies. Package cost varies for different courses, but it starts from 40,000–above 1 LPA. Almost all big companies like Samsung, Wipro, and Keltron are the main recruiting companies. Almost 80% got internships. The best internships for ECE students depend on their interests and career goals, but popular options include embedded systems (IoT, microcontrollers like Arduino/Raspberry Pi), VLSI design, and communications technology (5G, signal processing). By taking this, you can be an Electronic Engineer. Big industrial companies are trying to take these engineers because the whole world is going EV right now, in engines, machines, everything.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The thrive for education .

content.Placements: Placements are offered by many companies, so many branches are available and more companies are attracted to the freshers. The big companies like JCB, Asian Paints, Rubber Board industries and Tire Industries have frequently conducted placements over the past year .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. Another building is under construction for the expansion of the college campus and education system. The college is in the developing phase, where new infrastructure and new courses have been added and new buildings and facilities are being deployed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is indeed a good place to learn!

content.Placements: Most of the people without any backlogs or with lower grades are placed in multinational companies with industry-standard packages. Some students have been placed in firms related to software development and product design. Almost all students got internship opportunities at software development firms.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is equipped with standard equipment, and it is a clean and green campus. There are many classrooms, labs, and a vast library for books. The library contains numerous books related to coursework and has computers connected to the internet to browse academic journals and catalogues. The management constantly adds new updates to the infrastructure facilities throughout the year. College Wi-Fi is allotted to students if needed.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A place filled with hope and memories.

content.Placements: In our course, more than 70% of students are placed in good companies with a good package. One of the top recruiters like TCS is recruiting from here, and there are many alumni who are offering various jobs in various companies. Also, the teachers here guide us in the process of recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: A good atmosphere suited for studies, a well-maintained structure mainly for studies, and a well-structured library with course-oriented books. The hostel is environment-friendly, the place is filled with scenery and good and hygienic food, and the wardens are mostly teachers who are here to guide us.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A wonderful journey filled with memories.

content.Placements: The placement drives, including top companies like TCS, provide a promising start with a good salary. The teachers are very supportive; they help us to the utmost to provide a good career. Also, the experience gained here is endless. We have a very supportive line of alumni for help.
content.Infrastructure: A good learning atmosphere, with the presence of group study, increases in-depth knowledge. The experience gained from living in the hostel is endless; it helps us in many ways, like making us punctual and providing us a path to success not only in education but also in life.

admission_process.title: TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic admission 2025 is open. Candidates can apply for BTech and Diploma courses in the stream of Engineering. At TOMS-CEP, BTech degree is offered byKTU. Whereas the Diploma courses are approved by AICTE and affiliated to DTE. TOMS College of Engineering admission is both merit and entrance-based. Aspirants can apply with a valid score on the KEAM exam atTOMS College of Engineering.

Candidates seeking admission to TOMS-CEP courses must check out the course-specific eligibility criteria carefully. A total of six degree and diploma courses across multiple specialisations are offered at TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic. Students can read the table below to learn more on TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic admission highlights 2025:
Particulars
TOMS CEP Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-Time, Diploma
Programmes Offered
6 degree and diploma courses across multiple specialisations
How to apply?
https://toms.ac.in/
Application Status
Level of programmes offered
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic offers courses in the field ofEngineering, Commerce, Computer Applications etc. Students seeking admission must meet the course-specific eligibility and selection criteria. However, a student who is looking for BTech Lateral Entry admission should pass a Polytechnic Diploma. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection of all popularTOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic courses:
Class 12 in Science stream with at least 45% aggregate and Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry/Biotechnology/Computer Science/Biology
Know more aboutTOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic courses

TOMS-CEP admission process starts with registration for the preferred course. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for admission. Below is the step-wise admission process for TOMS-CEP:
STEP 1: TOMS-CEP Application Process 2025

Candidates can collect the prospectus and the application form from the college campus or apply online. Aspirants have sent the complete application form (hard copy) and a demand draft of INR 650 favouring TOMS College of Engineering.
STEP 2: Selection

TOMS College of Engineering selects candidates for all the courses based on merit excluding BTech courses. The selection criteria for the BTech course is KEAM. Apart from this, the selection criteria for After 10th diploma, BCom, BBA and BCA courses are merit-based. Once the candidate meets the eligibility criteria, candidates will be selected on merit.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the colleges release a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted seats in the colleges. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Who can apply for BTech course at TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed Class 12 in science stream with at least 45% aggregate are eligible for BTech admission. Candidates must have Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry/Biotechnology/Computer Science/Biology to apply for TOMS-CEP BTech programme. Admission to the BTech course is based on KEAM score.

faqs.question: Is BTech course is available at TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic?
faqs.answer: Yes, BTech courses are offered at TOMS-CEP. The course is offered in six specialisations for four years duration. However, the total tuition fee for the course ranges between INR 40,000 to INR 1.4 lakh. Apart from this, students should meet the last educational qualification set by the institutions. Candidates should complete Class 12 in Science stream with at least 45% aggregate and Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry/Biotechnology/Computer Science/Biology

courses_data.description: TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic offers a three-year Diploma course. All candidates seeking admission to a three-year course should have completed Class 10 as the last educational qualification. Students will be selected on a merit basis for admission to the After-10th diploma course.

faqs.question: How many After 10th Diploma courses are offered at TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic?
faqs.answer: A total of six After 10th Diploma courses are offered at TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic. The duration for the course is three-years. To enrol for admission at TOMS-CEP, candidates need to meet the educational qualification set by the institute. However, aspirants who have completed Class 10 can apply for this course.

faqs.question: How to pursur After 10th Diploma courses at TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic?
faqs.answer: TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic offers three-year long Diploma courses in the stream of Engineering. Students can pursue TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic offered Diploma courses after passing Class 10 from a recognised board.

faqs.question: Which courses does TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic offer to students?
faqs.answer: TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic has courses such as BTech, Diploma and Degree. These courses are in the stream of Engineering, Computer Application etc. TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic has specialisations such as Automobile Engineering, Chemical Engineering, etc. The college also offer other degree courses such as BCom, BBA and BCA courses.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic?
faqs.answer: Yes, TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic requires KEAM score for BTech course admission. The KEAM exam, syllabus is based on three subjects namely Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics. After being thorough with the syllabus, candidates must check the exam pattern. Apart from this, the candidates who are looking for other course admissions such as BCom, BBA, After 10th Diploma etc will be selected on a merit basis.

faqs.question: How can I join TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic?
faqs.answer: At TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic, candidates can apply for UG or Diploma levels courses. Admission to Diploma courses is merit-based. However, for UG level BTech programme, candidates are admitted through the following two ways:Gov. Quota:50 % of the seats are reserved as Government quota. This will be allotted by the Commissioner of Entrance Examinations (CEE), Govt. of Kerala.Convenor Quota:50 % of the seats are offered through management quota

faqs.question: Who is eligible for course admission at TOMS College of Engineering and Polytechnic?
faqs.answer: TOMS-CEP eligibility criteria varies course-wise. The basic eligibility is Class 12 for UG courses and Class 10 for After 10th Diploma courses. reviews.review_heading: TOMS Engineering College Is always a better option
reviews.review_text: TOMS Engineering College is the only engineering college in Kerala having Learjet 25B heavy aircraft and Cessna 150 light aeroplane. The heavy aeroplane Learjet 25B has a 10-seater capacity. The Cessna 150 aircraft for aeronautical engineering is a two-seater aircraft. There are lots of other things too.

reviews.review_heading: The thrive for education .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Another building is under construction for the expansion of the college campus and education system. The college is in the developing phase, where new infrastructure and new courses have been added and new buildings and facilities are being deployed.

reviews.review_heading: It is indeed a good place to learn!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is equipped with standard equipment, and it is a clean and green campus. There are many classrooms, labs, and a vast library for books. The library contains numerous books related to coursework and has computers connected to the internet to browse academic journals and catalogues. The management constantly adds new updates to the infrastructure facilities throughout the year. College Wi-Fi is allotted to students if needed.

reviews.review_heading: A place filled with hope and memories.
reviews.review_text: A good atmosphere suited for studies, a well-maintained structure mainly for studies, and a well-structured library with course-oriented books. The hostel is environment-friendly, the place is filled with scenery and good and hygienic food, and the wardens are mostly teachers who are here to guide us.

reviews.review_heading: A wonderful journey filled with memories.
reviews.review_text: A good learning atmosphere, with the presence of group study, increases in-depth knowledge. The experience gained from living in the hostel is endless; it helps us in many ways, like making us punctual and providing us a path to success not only in education but also in life.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college to study in.
reviews.review_text: All facilities, like labs, are available. There are many books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good place to study.
reviews.review_text: There are enough facilities for labs and classes. Hostel facilities are also reasonable. It is a good place to live. You can't expect to visit the college dreaming of a huge campus because the college is in the development stage. Students will always be under surveillance, which ensures their safety on campus.

reviews.review_heading: TOMS College of Engineering is the place where dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: TOMS college has pretty decent facilities for the academic blocks. Separate girls and boys hostels are available with good quality food. Workshops and labs are excellent. A calm and quiet library is a peculiar feature of our college. Students corner with stationery and cool bar is available within the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely thrilled of what I am becoming in the hands of my college I am so great full .
reviews.review_text: TOMS college has well-equipped labs, classrooms, sports facilities and hostels. The campus at mattakara is huge and had a lot of places to chill with friends. You can't go wrong with campus life here. The students are friendly and the atmosphere is cheerful, and you could make friends very easily.

reviews.review_heading: Worst collage life,average infrastructure and faculty
reviews.review_text:
Labs doesn't have that much facilities 
Lab machines are most broken 
Hostel is worst,very high fee for below average food and facilities,rooms are filled with around 10 students each
Labs are kind of worn out and most lab incharges doesn't know what to do

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Ours is a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. It is available in our hostels as well. Our library is one of the biggest in the city, with around 30,000 engineering books alone. Classrooms are well-equipped with projectors. High-quality food is provided in the hostel. Volleyball, football, and cricket facilities are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best for studying and making your future bright.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good. The infrastructure is also good. The good quality of the hostel makes it a good place to study. The food is also delicious. There is also a well-organised library and clean classrooms.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the School of Engineering and Technology, Sushant University:

reviews_list.batch_info: BCA (Hons.) in Cyber Security - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The dream of a hacker in college.

review_content.Placements: As the college is in Gurugram, placement is 100% in my batch. Companies like TCS, IBM, Google, Cosco, and many more are welcomed, with no minimum package limit. In cybersecurity, we generally get placed as security managers and in other jobs as B.Tech students, as this course covers everything the same as in a B.Tech program. The highest package is 20 LPA, the average is 7 LPA, and the lowest is 2-3 LPA. 100% internships are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is superb. Labs and classes are first-class, with a smartboard in every classroom, and teachers use whiteboards for teaching. The hostel is very expensive, so I suggest not to stay in the hostel. Gurugram is also very expensive, so I advise you to live in a cheaper place, as my college is connected by metro, so it is not a problem to travel. The canteen is expensive, but medical facilities are available for free. Sports and games are there, but the college doesn't care much about them.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good faculty and quality education, placements are average and the infrastructure is good.

review_content.Placements: Around 25% of students got placed in 2024 in B.Tech AIML. Top recruiting companies are Wipro and ITC. The highest package offered is around 35 LPA - 40 LPA. The lowest package is around 7 LPA - 8 LPA. The average package is around 15 LPA. Students got internships in prestigious companies like Adobe and Microsoft. The college offers internships on the campus itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are spacious and comfortable. Most of the classrooms have ACs. Some labs have faculty computers and chairs. Washrooms are in good condition. Wi-Fi is provided around the campus. The hostel rooms are comfortable with 2 to 3 students in each room. The food in the mess is hygienic and healthy.

overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: School of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty support and great infrastructure.

content.Placements: Most of the students have been placed at good places from Sushant University. The highest packages are 40 LPA and 20 LPA. The average placement packages are 7 LPA-8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the university is great. There are separate buildings for each department. Lush green field for sports and football turf. Various canteen vendors and the main canteen are also established. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. There are two libraries within the campus.
content.Faculty: The faculty, as far as I'm concerned, is the best part here. They are very supportive of every student and are highly qualified. The courses designed are very appropriate to the real-time industry, with specializations also available. The exams are highly intellectual, for which the student has to be well prepared with everything that has been taught. The faculty is very supportive during placements and guides students through it so that every student can be placed at the highest potential.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Up till now completely satisfied and totally worth it. Faculty members are nice.

content.Placements: A lot of students are placed. The highest package last year was 25 LPA, and the average salary was 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Google, Samsung, SGG, and Nagaroo. Top roles are mechanical engineer and software engineer. Everyone is provided the chance of placements by the placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus as well as in hostels with great facilities like sports, libraries, cafes, and classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and ACs. Hostels and mess are great. Breakfast, lunch, snacks, and dinner are served taking into consideration both vegetarian and non-vegetarian. The campus canteen is great with lots of varieties of other chains of food available at affordable prices.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (Hons.) in Cyber Security - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The dream of a hacker in college.

content.Placements: As the college is in Gurugram, placement is 100% in my batch. Companies like TCS, IBM, Google, Cosco, and many more are welcomed, with no minimum package limit. In cybersecurity, we generally get placed as security managers and in other jobs as B.Tech students, as this course covers everything the same as in a B.Tech program. The highest package is 20 LPA, the average is 7 LPA, and the lowest is 2-3 LPA. 100% internships are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college is superb. Labs and classes are first-class, with a smartboard in every classroom, and teachers use whiteboards for teaching. The hostel is very expensive, so I suggest not to stay in the hostel. Gurugram is also very expensive, so I advise you to live in a cheaper place, as my college is connected by metro, so it is not a problem to travel. The canteen is expensive, but medical facilities are available for free. Sports and games are there, but the college doesn't care much about them.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and quality education, placements are average and the infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Around 25% of students got placed in 2024 in B.Tech AIML. Top recruiting companies are Wipro and ITC. The highest package offered is around 35 LPA - 40 LPA. The lowest package is around 7 LPA - 8 LPA. The average package is around 15 LPA. Students got internships in prestigious companies like Adobe and Microsoft. The college offers internships on the campus itself.
content.Infrastructure: Our classrooms are spacious and comfortable. Most of the classrooms have ACs. Some labs have faculty computers and chairs. Washrooms are in good condition. Wi-Fi is provided around the campus. The hostel rooms are comfortable with 2 to 3 students in each room. The food in the mess is hygienic and healthy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Cloud Technology and Information Security) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Connectivity is very good, the nearest metro station is 100M away.

content.Placements: Students above 65% are placed in my course. The highest salary package offered is 46 LPA. The average salary package offered is 6 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Taking about this year Okinava is the top recruiting company for my course. Most of the time having an internship depends on the skills owned by students but in another case, a student having a minimum of 70% can get an internship.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is very good at providing facilities to the students. Every lab has proper internet connection and rooms are completely air-conditioned. We can easily get any book related to any course in our central library. Our college has 2 full-size libraries where individual sitting is also available. Our college also provides hostel facilities at very regional rates. In hostel, we are allotted a shared room which includes one bed, one study table, and an air-conditioner. In hostel mess, breakfast, lunch, and dinner are included in the hostel fee.

hostel.description: Sushant University provides hostels on triple sharing basis which can accommodate 300 students. The hostels provides the facilities like house keeping, common/dinning room with TV, newspapers & magazines, outdoors games facilities like Basket Ball, Football, Cricket, volleyball.

library.description: Sushant University library has three sections including a main section and has two auxiliary sections where 200 students can be accommodated. It has the collection of approx. 45,000 books and CDs on Architecture, Applied Science, Biotechnology, Computer Science, Design, Engineering, Education, Humanities, Hotel Management, Management, Literature, Law and Liberal Arts, etc. It also has a vast collection of reference books; handbooks, dictionaries and encyclopedia. The Library is fully automated and computerized by LS Ease software. The library has also subscribed to the online Journals and database like IEEE, EBSCO host, JSTOR, MANUPATRA and also member of DELNET.

paragraphs: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.

The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.
The average salary for PhD CSE scholars in the beginning is somewhere around INR 6 to 14 LPA.

So, as you move forward in your career journey and get some years of experience, the salary at mid-senior level positions is somewhere between INR 14 LPA and INR 20 LPA. For senior-level positions, the recruiters are ready to offer above INR 20 LPA because of the expanding scope of CSE. So, you must focus on improving your skills and gaining experience as much as possible.

review_summary.college_name: Government Engineering College, Raipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, average placement, really good infrastructure, etc.

content.Placements: Hardly five to ten percent of students are placed in our college. The highest package on campus is hardly 4 Lacs. The top recruiting companies for my course are LNT, Adani Group, RIL (Reliance Industries Limited), and many other private limited or limited companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our library is very vast with air conditioning, and it also has Wi-Fi facilities. Our classrooms have air conditioning and Wi-Fi. There are almost every type of lab present. The workshop is also very good and big for students, with CNC machines and other machines like lathes, drilling , etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Untold story Of GEC Raipur.

content.Placements: In this year's graduating class, only 10% of the students were placed. The highest package was 8 lakhs, the lowest was 4 lakhs, and the average package was 6 lakhs. The companies that recruited students were Adani Groups. Internship opportunities are not usually available in this branch. The roles that were offered were junior engineer, engineer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has free Wi-Fi, a well-established library, very good labs, and digital classrooms. However, the college does not currently offer on-campus housing. On the plus side, the college does have good medical facilities and a good selection of games.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Top institute of Chhattisgarh for B.Tech courses.

content.Placements: The placement in this college is below average. The big teaching companies don't visit this college to offer jobs or internships. The placements in the electrical and electronics branch are very low; the average package offered by the companies to the students is about 3 to 4 lacs per annum only.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite good. The hygiene on the college campus is given the utmost importance and the hostel provided by the college is very neat and clean. The courses on the beaches are taught by the best professors and all the students are given personal importance regarding the subjects.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: About my college- GEC Raipur.

content.Placements: In government engineering college Raipur, the placement rate is 30 percent and the highest package in government engineering college was 10 LPA and the average package is around 4 LPA. The percent of students who get internships at GEC Raipur is around 2 to 3 percent.
content.Infrastructure: I have a good interest in my chosen branch, electrical and electronics engineering. The Government Engineering College in Raipur has good infrastructure, a high-quality library, and Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The faculty at GEC Raipur are well experienced.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are well educated.

content.Placements: Average package is 10 Lacs. And in our college even in our brand mechanical engineering department we get 20-30% of placement. The top roles offered to our college is generally a employees position & max to max HR position. The lowest package is 4 Lacs .
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of our college is perfect. description: Government Engineering College, Raipur cutoff 2025 will be released soon for admission to the BE/BTech courses. In the meantime, aspirants seeking admission can check the sections below to view Government Engineering College, Raipur cutoff 2024 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories to understand the cutoff trends. A few more updates are given below:

Government Engineering College, Raipur CG PET cutoff 2025 has been released for the second round for candidates waiting to get admission to B.E. / B.Tech course. The cutoff list was released category-wise as opening-closing cutoff ranks. The cutoff ranks also varied on the basis of gender, as some reservations were made for Female category students.

CG PET cutoff 2025 is finally out for students seeking admission to various undergraduate engineering courses in the state of Chhattisgarh. Government Engineering College, Raipur has also released the second round cutoff list for aspiring candidates, based on JEE Main scores and CG PET counselling. The minimum cutoff for admission to any branch was 35, for candidates belonging to the General HS category. The maximum required cutoff rank is 351 during Round 2 admission.

The Directorate of Technical Education (DTE) have announced the CG PET 2025 counselling dates online. CG PET 2025 seat allotment results are being announced separately for the different rounds of counselling. Allotment of seats will be done based on the candidate's obtained rank, preferences, category and seat availability. Candidates can check out the important CGPET 2025 datesc in the table below:

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. I would rate it 10 stars out of 10. All facilities are good. Our campus is fully air-conditioned. There is a huge library in this college. Classrooms are well-maintained. Playgrounds are available. Our campus has greenery all around. Hostels are good.

reviews.review_heading: It was an excellent college in Raipur, and it provided good placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available. Labs are good. Projectors are available in all classrooms. The hostel facilities are not available. A canteen is available. The quality of food in the canteen is good. A variety of food items are served in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The auditorium is the main attraction of this college. Classrooms have 3 air-conditioners. We also have a gym facility in this college.

reviews.review_heading: College life is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel was good. Sports and game facilities were available. The quality of the food was good. The water facilities were not good. The hostel was good for new students. The hostel fee was reasonable.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the infrastructure of GEC but placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, labs, and the library of GEC Raipur are good. Wi-Fi is also available on campus and all classes are air-conditioned. The hostel is not allotted to students yet. The quality of food served in the canteen is good. The prices of food items are not too expensive and the taste is good.

reviews.review_heading: College is good, it is the students who have to work hard.
reviews.review_text: Being a government college there is no scarcity of funding. So no doubt infrastructure is best. Wi-Fi facilities are spread all over campus. Labs are also fully maintained and sophisticated. Mess and canteen facilities are also good. Medical facilities are also there.

reviews.review_heading: You can gain huge knowledge here with very low fees.

All modern facilities are available in classrooms. Hostel facilities are not available for boys as the hostels are currently occupied by IIT Bhilai. Hostel facilities are available for girls, but there're only 15-20 seats.

reviews.review_heading: Quite satisfied because of faculty, good placement, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are almost good. It's provide smart classroom, Wi-Fi, different labs, library. Facilities of hostel are not that much good, unhygienic, in one room 3-4bed are provided. Quality of food are also bad in taste. Medical facilities provided. Sports facilities are excellent in a week tournament were conducted.

reviews.review_heading: I loved the curriculum, fest, and also as IIT Bhilai is our neighbour, it helped me alot.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel available till now. The infrastructure is also not good. There are no sports facilities. If students come here by listening from someone that placements are good then they heard it wrong. Although curriculum sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college experience is good.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is available but students preferred PG or rental view. It provides well-maintained laboratories, a highly advanced classroom, library with standard books, on-campus canteen facility is also available, for a medical facility the nearest hospital is available. For sports a big college ground is available.

faqs.answer: A:    As per Shiksha verified reviews, Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology has an impressive review rating of 4.15 by 45 students.
faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Bhubaneswar is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Science. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and UG Diploma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, M.Sc. and PG Diploma. The fee structure for the Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Bhubaneswar programmes is around INR 62,150 to 2,16,000.

review_content.General: The college is not that good but the environment is pretty nice. Wi-Fi is available for the students, and labs and tool room facilities add more value to their knowledge and practice. The library can be used by students for free and provides books to borrow. Hostel quality is good; rooms are clean and electricity is also provided but the food quality is not good because of the management; the food served was very low quality. A canteen is available where students can watch TV and enjoy their meals. Medical facilities are available and one of the doctors is assigned for the primary checkup. Indoor and outdoor games are the main reason for students health and that is provided by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Plastics Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college for graduation as well as diploma courses.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. The average salary package offered was 5.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Maruti Suzuki and Reliance. Top roles are offered in this course. Students who score 60-70% of marks are eligible for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Laboratories and classrooms are very good. Hostel facilities are great. Digital classrooms are well-maintained. The food quality is average. Medical facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Manufacturing Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology.

review_content.Placements: Around 100% of students get placements but some choose higher study. The highest salary package is 5 LPA and the lowest salary package is 2.02 LPA. Top Recruiters are Lohia, Emami, etc. All the students get internships in the same company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good and extra classrooms are available in an emergency. Too many conference rooms, so no need to compromise. Conference halls have 6 to 7 screens. Teachers and students are well connected. Decent labs are available with all facilities. Library is good and a digital library is also available. Hostel infrastructure can be given 5 out of 5 with excellent bathrooms and toilets cleaned regularly. Mess food quality is 4/5. Still worth considering the price and you won't get used to the daily dal sabzi. They try to keep your interest. There is space for a small ground for cricket, badminton, and table tennis but has no field.
