content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. The average salary package offered was 5.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Maruti Suzuki and Reliance. Top roles are offered in this course. Students who score 60-70% of marks are eligible for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories and classrooms are very good. Hostel facilities are great. Digital classrooms are well-maintained. The food quality is average. Medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Manufacturing Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Around 100% of students get placements but some choose higher study. The highest salary package is 5 LPA and the lowest salary package is 2.02 LPA. Top Recruiters are Lohia, Emami, etc. All the students get internships in the same company.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good and extra classrooms are available in an emergency. Too many conference rooms, so no need to compromise. Conference halls have 6 to 7 screens. Teachers and students are well connected. Decent labs are available with all facilities. Library is good and a digital library is also available. Hostel infrastructure can be given 5 out of 5 with excellent bathrooms and toilets cleaned regularly. Mess food quality is 4/5. Still worth considering the price and you won't get used to the daily dal sabzi. They try to keep your interest. There is space for a small ground for cricket, badminton, and table tennis but has no field.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Manufacturing Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It provides good placements for 2015 and facilities are also fine.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students are placed. The average salary offered is Rs 10,000 per month. The top recruiting companies are Tata, Reliance, and more many companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are available like Wi-Fi, laboratories, and classroom. It provides a library and smart class. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good. The food served is good, and the mess is good. The canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are available.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is good. It makes the students industry-ready. The semester exams in this college exam are very difficult.

paragraphs: Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Bhubaneswar admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Bhubaneswar considers scores in JEE Main, GATE, and CUET-PG for admission to specific courses.Central Institute of Plastics Engineering and Technology, Bhubaneswaroffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 18 months - 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 1,03,450 - 2,16,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 62,150 - 1,20,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.
Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

The self-contained hostel provides many amenities such as internet room, reading room, indoor games, gym a lounge and a dining hall besides an uninterrupted supply of regular water and purified drinking water. A medical officer is also attached to the hostel to provide emergency medical care.

The MLSU Udaipur flagship courses are BTech & MBA. The university offers a wide range of courses to candidates at the UG and PG levels. As per NIRF 2025, the ranking of the institute is #64 in the Pharmacy category.
Mohanlal Sukhadia University is one of the premier institutions for courses in the field of Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies, etc. Below are some of the courses offered by Mohanlal Sukhadia University and their respective eligibility & fee:

faqs.question: Where are MLSU alumni working?

faqs.answer: A:    The average salary package of MLSU MBA is INR 5.20 lakh according to students’ reviews on shiksha.com. Top companies, like Tata Motors, Reliance, TCC, etc., visited MLSU campus for placements. Top roles like HR, manager and branch manager of the company are offered to the students.Overall the highest package offered was INR 45 lakh for in 2022 at MLSU. Further, the average package and the lowest package stood at INR 23.10 Lacs and INR 1.20 lakh, respectively.
faqs.question: How is the placement of MBA at MLSU?

faqs.answer: A:    During 2022 placements, the University has recorded the highest-ever package of INR 45 LPA. Earlier, the highest package stood at INR 7 LPA during 2021 placements. Over the past three years, a fluctuating trend was recorded in the highest package. faqs.answer: A:    MLSU eligibility criteria differs course to course. For BTech and BArch admission at MLSU, candidates must have passed Class 12 in PCM with at least 45% aggregate. MLSU offers a wide range of courses at UG and PG level and most of the courses requires minimum 45%-50% aggregate in their required qualification examination (Class 12 or graduation). Admission to MLSU courses is given on the basis of merit list followed by counselling.
faqs.question: What is the percentage required for MLSU?

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: It has affordable courses with good faculty, decent infrastructure, but limited placements.

review_content.Placements: Placements are limited and it is around 30 to 40 percent. The highest package ranges from 4 to 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting organisations are NGOs, counseling centers, hospitals, and academic institutions. Roles offered are mostly counselor, research assistant, teaching assistant, and clinical psychology trainee.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has decent infrastructure, spacious classrooms, a library, and a small psychology lab. Hostel facilities are available separately for both boys and girls. Hygiene and maintenance could be better. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus, but connectivity is not always consistent.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Decent academics and a peaceful campus, but it lacks practical exposure and strong placements.

review_content.Placements: I am pursuing a B.Com from MLSU, Udaipur, and will graduate with the 2025 batch. Around 20-30% of students in our course got placed, with packages ranging from 2 LPA to 8 LPA, and an average of about 3.5 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiters included Deloitte, ICICI Bank, HDFC Life, and some local startups. Around 30-50% of students got internships, mostly in CA firms, banks, and finance startups. Common roles offered are audit assistant, financial analyst, accounts executive, and business development executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: MLSU's B.Com department has basic facilities like spacious classrooms, a good library, limited Wi-Fi, and access to a computer lab. Hostels are average, mess food is simple and hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical help is basic, with a campus health center. Sports facilities include playgrounds, indoor games, and a gym.

review_summary.college_name: MLSU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. B.Ed. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: MLSU has a serene campus with decent facilities and a strong academic foundation.

content.Placements: There are some placements at MLSU, but not many. While many students find employment on their own or take government exams, about 25% of students are placed through campus drives. While some people receive good packages, the average is in the lower-to-mid range. The majority of positions offered are in basic corporate roles, banking sales, etc. The platform is provided by the university, but it's not a placement-driven campus, what matters most is your own initiative, connections, and abilities. Instead of depending on the college to provide opportunities for you, it's more important to create your own.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the staff, campus, and education.

content.Placements: Not many of my batchmates are left out of placements. It is pretty fine and satisfied with the placements done here. Many students get placements here. As far as I can remember, the students are also very much satisfied with their respective placement offers.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very nice. College campus is vast and diverse in area. Hostel facility is also available and very good. Sports are really taken seriously here. Campus is spread over 6-7 acres of land.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. They are very qualified, knowledgeable, and experienced. The course curriculum is also very relevant. It makes the students industry-ready. Exams are not that difficult. Teachers are helpful and friendly with the students. Teachers are again very supportive and helpful.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has affordable courses with good faculty, decent infrastructure, but limited placements.

content.Placements: Placements are limited and it is around 30 to 40 percent. The highest package ranges from 4 to 5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting organisations are NGOs, counseling centers, hospitals, and academic institutions. Roles offered are mostly counselor, research assistant, teaching assistant, and clinical psychology trainee.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has decent infrastructure, spacious classrooms, a library, and a small psychology lab. Hostel facilities are available separately for both boys and girls. Hygiene and maintenance could be better. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus, but connectivity is not always consistent.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Decent academics and a peaceful campus, but it lacks practical exposure and strong placements.

content.Placements: I am pursuing a B.Com from MLSU, Udaipur, and will graduate with the 2025 batch. Around 20-30% of students in our course got placed, with packages ranging from 2 LPA to 8 LPA, and an average of about 3.5 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiters included Deloitte, ICICI Bank, HDFC Life, and some local startups. Around 30-50% of students got internships, mostly in CA firms, banks, and finance startups. Common roles offered are audit assistant, financial analyst, accounts executive, and business development executive.
content.Infrastructure: MLSU's B.Com department has basic facilities like spacious classrooms, a good library, limited Wi-Fi, and access to a computer lab. Hostels are average, mess food is simple and hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical help is basic, with a campus health center. Sports facilities include playgrounds, indoor games, and a gym.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, placements, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: 40% placement rate for this course. The package started from 2 to 10 LPA. MPC Cloud Consulting Pvt. Ltd. was the top recruiting company. Approximately 30% of students got internships. The top role provided by the companies was accounting manager.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure was top-notch. All libraries, classrooms, and labs were excellent. That helped in my studies. The quality of facilities the college provided was also good. The food quality, the sports fields, and the medical facilities were all nice.

admission_overview.college_name: MLSU Admission 2026: Application Process, Eligibility, Selection & Courses

admission_overview.title: MLSU Udaipur Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: MLSU admission process is conducted based on both merit and entrance basis depending on the programme. The application process can be completed online. Mohanlal Sukhadia University offers courses at UG and PG levels. These are offered through more than thirty academic departments including Science, Management, Law and Commerce. Most of the MLSU courses accept admission on the basis of merit in the last qualifying examination. Selected candidates are required to appear for the counselling round for the final confirmation of the admission seat. For MLSU MBA and BTech admission, candidates must appear entrance exams, such as MAT and JEE main respectively. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility and admission process for Mohanlal Sukhadia University Udaipur.

paragraphs: Mohanlal Sukhadia University (MLSU) offers seats to eligible students after completion of all the admission stages. Before applying for MLSU admission, students must check the eligibility of the programme first. See below the guide forMLSU admission process:
MLSU Application Process 2026
Interested students can apply online through the MLSU admission portal (mlsuadmissions.sumsraj.com). Students may also submit the applications offline with documents + application fees.
MLSU Selection Process 2026

Admission is offered based on the merit list in the last qualifying exam. Students have to submit the marksheet of the last qualifying exam based on which a merit list is drawn. For courses, such as MBA, the university may consider national-level entrance tests. Students also have to go through counselling process before completing the admission process.
Seat Confirmation

Selected candidates are required to appear for the counselling round for the final confirmation of the admission seat. After the selection, students can apply for the hostel through the 'Hostel Apply' section (if required) on the admission portal and pay the admission fee through net banking/debit/credit card.

TheMLSU fee structureinclude different components. These are admission fees, tuition fee and hostel fee and more. The amount has to be paid through the accepted payment gateway. Some of the components are one-time payments, while the remaining are to be paid annually or semester-wise. Students can check the table below to know about theMLSU Udaipur feesfor some of the popular programmes:

placement_report.college_name: MLSU Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: MLSU Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: As per MLSU overall NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3 LPA , INR 4 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.2 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, 606 students were placed during 2022 placements and 100 students opted for higher education . The highest package offered was INR 45 LPA . Further, the average package and lowest package stood at INR 23.10 LPA and INR 1.20 LPA , respectively. The median package offered during MLSU placements 2022 was INR 7 LPA . PI Industries Limited recruited the highest number of students.
MLSU Placements 2022:

data: MLSU Placements 2022: The 2022 highest package was more than six times the amount offered in 2021 A growth of almost 23% was recorded in the number of recruiting companies in 2022 when compared with 2021

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, MLSU outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. MLSU's rankings in 'Pharmacy' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, MLSU fell 5 ranks to #64 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'State Public University' category, the rankings of the institute have demonstrated a stable trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, MLSU's rank is #51, the same as last year's rank in the 'State Public University' category by the NIRF ranking.

MLSU has received strong ranks by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, MLSU fell 400 ranks to #1201 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
One can observe that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, MLSU fell 134 ranks to #397 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.

hostel_campus.college_name: MLSU Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Mohanlal Sukhadia University UG eligibility - Class 12 with relevant subjects

reviews.review_heading: MLSU has a serene campus with decent facilities and a strong academic foundation.
reviews.review_text: The campus is spacious, green, and gives a peaceful vibe to the university. The classrooms are clean but not very modern; some buildings show signs of age. The library is genuinely useful, calm, and perfect for study sessions. Wi-Fi works in some places but is inconsistent everywhere. Computer labs work but aren't high-tech. The space given for sports and outdoor activities is there, and basic but affordable food is available at the canteen. Overall, the infrastructure isn't flashy or modern, bu...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the staff, campus, and education.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very nice. College campus is vast and diverse in area. Hostel facility is also available and very good. Sports are really taken seriously here. Campus is spread over 6-7 acres of land.

reviews.review_heading: It has affordable courses with good faculty, decent infrastructure, but limited placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has decent infrastructure, spacious classrooms, a library, and a small psychology lab. Hostel facilities are available separately for both boys and girls. Hygiene and maintenance could be better. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus, but connectivity is not always consistent.

reviews.review_heading: Decent academics and a peaceful campus, but it lacks practical exposure and strong placements.
reviews.review_text: MLSU's B.Com department has basic facilities like spacious classrooms, a good library, limited Wi-Fi, and access to a computer lab. Hostels are average, mess food is simple and hygienic, and a canteen is available. Medical help is basic, with a campus health center. Sports facilities include playgrounds, indoor games, and a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, placements, and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was top-notch. All libraries, classrooms, and labs were excellent. That helped in my studies. The quality of facilities the college provided was also good. The food quality, the sports fields, and the medical facilities were all nice.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, but you have to dedicate time to your studies.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. Labs are different for MCA and BCA students. Two libraries are here, and there is a mess and medical facilities, but they are not for BCA students. They are for the university, Mohanlal Sukhadia University. So apply if you want to come.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the university, faculty, and placements.
reviews.review_text: The hostel experience is average. There is no Wi-Fi or library. 80% of students live in private PG because the university does not have a place to make students stay. The university infrastructure has been developing but not developed since I was admitted.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, check it ones.
reviews.review_text: My college facilities and infrastructure are above average. It has 1 lab, 1 classroom, and 1 library. There is no Wi-Fi, its not bad infrastructure but same time not good. There is no hostel, no canteen, and no medical facilities. But every month sports and games events are organized by students.

reviews.review_heading: It is an affordable course and shows that the BCA program is budget-friendly.
reviews.review_text: I pursued a BCA in Computer Science from the 024-2026 batch. The infrastructure of the IT department is well-developed. Classrooms are spacious and equipped with smart boards and projectors. High-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus, including labs and library.

reviews.review_heading: Mohanlal Sukhadia University is overall the best college for every student.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and an excellent environment for students. The food quality is good, and the library offers the best environment on campus. The medical facilities are average, but we have solid sports and games programs.

reviews.review_heading: College with average fee, good quality, availability of labs, library, canteen, and best study.
reviews.review_text: Mohanlal Sukhadia University in Udaipur had a well-established infrastructure with facilities like spacious classrooms, specialized labs, and a large library. Basic amenities like electricity, water, furniture, and TV rooms were available. Girls' hostel had CCTV surveillance. The hostel mess provided hygienic food. Hostels were located within the university campus. The hostel environment was fresh with a big garden. MLSU had a health center with doctors and nursing staff for the university commu...

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of lack of infrastructure and placement cell.
reviews.review_text: There are two libraries, with free A.I.R. subscription. Buildings are nicely ventilated however, classrooms don't get clean that often. Wi-Fi services are not available. The canteen is almost non-existent. No sports infrastructure and medical facilities are also questionable.

reviews.review_heading: I felt disappointed because of the placement issues.
reviews.review_text: Law department classrooms are functional and well-maintained with a healthy and clean environment. Facilities include two libraries with chairs and tables and one library is air-conditioned and has cool drinking water facilities. Washrooms are clean and well-maintained. It provides a canteen and other parking facilities. Hostel facilities are provided with a library, good food, clean mess, washrooms, and other areas. It has sports facilities like basketball, volleyball, badminton, cricket, etc. ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Shri Govind Guru Government CollegeReviewed on 14 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is not outstanding. It has good infrastructure. Faculty members are quite good.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is decent but not outstanding. Classrooms and labs are functional, but average. The library has a massive collection and it is sufficient for basic needs. Sports facilities are available for every sport. The infrastructure is average but sports facilities are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Degree Science CollegeReviewed on 2 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is actually very good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college was very good. The science labs, library, and gym were available in the college and hostel. The quality of food was very good in the hostel. A canteen was also available on the college campus. Medical facilities, games, and sports were provided by the college.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Mohanlal Sukhadia University

likes.text: Top recruiting companies like Hindustan Zinc Limited, TCS, Birla Power, Plants Coromandel, Viz, SK, Laxmi Agro Consultants, Shree Cements, JK Cement, Menteo Premises, Bharat Textiles, etc., visit our campus.
The college offer course like B.Sc., M.Sc, Botany, Zoology, Geology, Physics, Chemistry and Technology.

Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Parvatibai Genba Moze College of Engineering offers MBA/PGDM and MCA. faqs.answer:
A:    Parvatibai Genba Moze College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate who have passed Diploma in Engineering & Technology & obtained at least 45% marks (40% marks for Backward class, EWS & PWD candidates belonging to Maharashtra State only) can also apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed minimum three year Bachelor's Degree in any discipline or its equivalent with above mentioned marks (45% in case of candidates of backward class categories and Persons with Disability belonging to Maharashtra State only) from any of the Universities recognised by UGC or AIU.MCACandidate must have completed B.C.A/ B.Sc. (Computer Science) /B.Sc (IT) /B.E. (CSE) / B.Tech (CSE) / B.E. (IT) / B.Tech. (IT) or equivalent Degree with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
Or 
Candidate who have completed any graduation degree B.E./B.Tech/ B.Sc/ B.Com/ B.A. /B.Voc. preferably with Mathematics at 10+2 Level or at Graduation Level (with additional bridge Courses as per the norms of the concerned University) with above marks can also apply.
Candidates appearing for final year of qualifying examination are also eligible to appear.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: When you come in this college the only thing you have to do is self study .

review_content.Placements: In this college, there are very low chances of getting placed on campus; you have to find a good job off-campus using your talent. Otherwise, the college is good; the teachers are very supportive. They provide you with study materials and all, but you have to do many things on your own.
review_content.Infrastructure: About the facilities, I must say you get free Wi-Fi in each computer lab. The college library was also good. There are 2-3 water filters in each department building, and we also have college sports teams, so if you are interested in cricket, football, basketball, or kabaddi, then you can participate.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Data Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The worst decision of my life.

review_content.Placements: As my course is new, there are a few percent of students who have got placement. My senior has told me, “ If you work hard, then this will be the best course for you.” I'm in my second year of AIDS second year I have learnt so many things in this course and I found this course so useful .
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college was decent. In my opinion, I didn't like the infrastructure of the college. The campus was also decent. I am writing this review in the rainy season as there is no cleanliness. There is dirt everywhere in the campus. My infrastructure of the hostel was good . My room was at a height, so it was better .

overview_faqs.question: Is Parvatibai Genba Moze College of Engineering a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Parvatibai Genba Moze College of Engineering is a renowned institution offering MBA/PGDM, B.E. / B.Tech, MCA. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Business & Management Studies, Engineering, IT & Software. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Parvatibai Genba Moze College of Engineering boasts an impressive review rating of 3.93 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.8 for Campus Life, 3.45 for Placements, 4.2 for Faculty, and 4.03 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Parvatibai Genba Moze College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Basic campus, no coding culture, and low placements – only self-effort can save you here.

content.Placements: Placements are below average with only 15-20% of students placed. Average package is around 2.5- 3 LPA. Few core companies visit, and most internships or good roles are secured by students through off-campus efforts, not college support. Internship opportunities through the college are rare. Less than 10% of students land good internships, mostly from self-efforts on platforms like Internshala or LinkedIn. No proper training, coding culture, or placement preparation guidance is provided by the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is outdated and poorly maintained. Wi-Fi rarely works, labs have limited equipment, and classrooms lack basic cleanliness. There is no proper library space or reading environment. Hostel facilities are below average, with poor food quality in the mess, no proper sports ground, and zero active medical support. The environment feels more restrictive than encouraging.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of Parvatibai Genba Moze College.

content.Placements: In total, 50% or fewer students get placements in this college. The highest package is 43 LPA Japanese yen, and the lowest is 1.2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, and Nvidia etc. Around 30% of students get internships in this college.
content.Infrastructure: A few faculty members are good, but the rest are average. College labs have Wi-Fi facility support and are decent, with most equipment in working condition. Classrooms are also decent. I have not opted for the hostel, so don't know any thing about it. The college organizes sports events like kabaddi, cricket, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: When you come in this college the only thing you have to do is self study .

content.Placements: In this college, there are very low chances of getting placed on campus; you have to find a good job off-campus using your talent. Otherwise, the college is good; the teachers are very supportive. They provide you with study materials and all, but you have to do many things on your own.
content.Infrastructure: About the facilities, I must say you get free Wi-Fi in each computer lab. The college library was also good. There are 2-3 water filters in each department building, and we also have college sports teams, so if you are interested in cricket, football, basketball, or kabaddi, then you can participate.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The worst decision of my life.

content.Placements: As my course is new, there are a few percent of students who have got placement. My senior has told me, “ If you work hard, then this will be the best course for you.” I'm in my second year of AIDS second year I have learnt so many things in this course and I found this course so useful .
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college was decent. In my opinion, I didn't like the infrastructure of the college. The campus was also decent. I am writing this review in the rainy season as there is no cleanliness. There is dirt everywhere in the campus. My infrastructure of the hostel was good . My room was at a height, so it was better .

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied because of less placements and packages in my college.

content.Placements: 20% of students get placement in my college and the average package is only 4 lacs, and the highest package is 8 lacs rupees. My college has a B.Tech. in AI and Data Scientists, Mechanical Engineering, and CS Engineering. All these courses are present at my college.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good classrooms, library and separate labs for different departments. The quality of the facilities is not good in my hostel, as the water facilities are very bad. The hostel canteen or mess is not available at any college. Various events occur in college.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Basic campus, no coding culture, and low placements – only self-effort can save you here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is outdated and poorly maintained. Wi-Fi rarely works, labs have limited equipment, and classrooms lack basic cleanliness. There is no proper library space or reading environment. Hostel facilities are below average, with poor food quality in the mess, no proper sports ground, and zero active medical support. The environment feels more restrictive than encouraging.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Parvatibai Genba Moze College.
reviews.review_text: A few faculty members are good, but the rest are average. College labs have Wi-Fi facility support and are decent, with most equipment in working condition. Classrooms are also decent. I have not opted for the hostel, so don't know any thing about it. The college organizes sports events like kabaddi, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_text: The college has good classrooms, library and separate labs for different departments. The quality of the facilities is not good in my hostel, as the water facilities are very bad. The hostel canteen or mess is not available at any college. Various events occur in college.

reviews.review_heading: This college was above my expectations with good faculty and facilities for the students.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure for this course. The management of the college was very helpful in providing all the necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, labs, library, canteen, sports, etc. for the students. All these offered facilities were well maintained and of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: College is average but good in teaching.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are sometimes very helpful and sometimes not. They don't have public Wi-Fi, the lab is good and the classroom also a library. They don't have a hostel. We have school grounds big enough, and we have tournaments in our college of cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Parvatibai Genba Moze College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms are good. Our college doesn't provide accommodation inside the campus. Our college suggests staying in outside PGs. Labs are not good. They do not have equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Parvatibai Genba Moze College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide good infrastructure. The library is small. Wi-Fi is not available. The hostel is good and clean. Wi-Fi works well in the hostel. Warm water is provided all day, and it helps in the winter. There are no sports except cricket. Medical facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. A separate building is provided for each department. The reading room is good. Our college has a library, and it contains many books. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. It is available only in the department.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Facilities are great in this college. Classrooms are neat. Wi-Fi is also enabled, so we are very satisfied with this. It also has a huge library. Our college atmosphere is peaceful.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good Wi-Fi connection. Our classrooms have digital technology, high-class digital labs, and a good library with a huge reading hall. The food in the canteen is good. The hostel rooms and facilities provided are good. Sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by placement, infrastructure, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was provided all around the campus. Digital classrooms were there to impart proper knowledge. Labs and library were excellent and the canteen was awesome serving good quality snacks. There was a big sports playground for students to play cricket and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Parvatibai genba sopanrao moze patil college of engineering Campus is too large.
reviews.review_text:
Parvatibai genba sopanrao moze patil college of engineering Campus is too large. High-speed Wi-Fi is available for all students. Campus is neat and clean. Food is totally hygienic campus large and well maintained the campus is in wagholi Pune
.

reviews.review_heading: I am not fully satisfied with the college because the infrastructure is not that good.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel on the campus. There is a hostel outside of the college campus, so we have to walk a bit to reach the college from the hostel. There must be a hostel on the college campus so it will be easy for students to reach the college on time.
